PAGE 1 OF 1

CREATIVE CONTROL

Live tuning — changes apply instantly. No credits needed.

SLOW-MO / SPEED — --
GRAVITY — --
MODEL HEIGHT (fix floor clipping) — --
RING HEIGHT — --
CAMERA HEIGHT — --
HIT PUSH FORCE — --
HIT GIVE / WOBBLE — --
BANNON POSITION X — --
VIPER POSITION X — --
GRAPPLE LAB — CARRY / FORKLIFT
Grab someone & bend to tune live. Lower RADIUS = victim hugs your shoulders (kills the forward slide).
CARRY RADIUS (TIGHTNESS) — --
GRIP DISTANCE — --
CARRY HEIGHT — --
BODY TILT — --
BRIDGE / MAT DROP — --
HAND SPREAD — --
WEIGHT & HOIST
Hoist spin direction, and how heavy the carry feels (settle + sway).
HOIST ROTATION — --
CARRY HEFT (WEIGHT / SWAY) — --
KNOCKDOWN
How hard & low a dropped body slams to the mat.
FALL / SLAM FORCE — --
LIE FLAT — pull downed body to mat — --
LIE HEIGHT — body thickness on mat — --
RAGDOLL STRING — pose stiffness — --
ACTIVE RAGDOLL
Always-on physical body — Gang Beasts / UFC / Euphoria feel. Lower stiffness = floppier.
MUSCLE / STIFFNESS — low = floppy — --
HIT REACTION — how hard strikes rock the body — --
BODY COUPLING — hit bleeds into spine/hips — --
STAMINA SAG — exhaustion softens motors — --
STRIKE LAB
Throw a strike to feel it live. Affects all strikes.
STRIKE SPEED — --
REACH / EXTENSION — --
WIND-UP DEPTH — --
RECOVERY SPEED — --
HIT-STOP (IMPACT FREEZE) — --
DIVE LAB
Springboard & top/mid-rope dives. Climb a corner or rebound, then dive to feel it.
ARC HEIGHT — --
HANG TIME — --
FLIP SPEED — --
SPRINGBOARD BOOST — --
DIRECTOR
TARGET
MODE
SUBSTANCE
COLOR (HUE) 0°
COLOR VARIANCE 0.05
COLOR FREQUENCY (cycle) 0.00
TRANSPARENCY 0.92
VISCOSITY / THICKNESS 0.82
STICKINESS 0.85
BLOB SIZE 0.045
GRAVITY 1.00
AMOUNT PER THROW 18
Works in a fight or on the idle fighters in any menu. High viscosity sticks & drips slowly and follows the body as it moves; low viscosity splashes; loose/heavy stuff piles on the floor.
Align the fighters to your ring MODEL. Keep the LIVE PREVIEW showing and slide until the wrestlers stand on the deck, inside the ropes. Saves automatically.
FLOOR HEIGHT (raise onto deck) 0.00
RING WIDTH (X) 3.2
RING DEPTH (Z) 2.2
IMPACT JIGGLE INTENSITY 1.00
SOFT-TISSUE GIVE (chest / hips) 1.00
Scales the rig's secondary-motion wobble on every hit, with extra give routed to the chest and hips for dramatic impact feedback. Start a fight and land a few shots to feel it. (Per-bone jiggle rigs on imported GLB models come in the next pass.)
Live orientation & scale for the loaded GLB model on the selected fighter (set TARGET on the THROW tab — BANNON or VIPER). The built-in procedural body is posed by the rig instead.
YAW (turn) 0°
PITCH (tilt fwd/back) 0°
ROLL (lean) 0°
SCALE 1.00×
HEIGHT OFFSET 0.00
Load a GLB model in FIGHTER MODELS, then REFRESH.
FIND BONE (type to filter)
BONE
ROTATE X 0°
ROTATE Y 0°
ROTATE Z 0°
MOVE X 0.000
MOVE Y 0.000
MOVE Z 0.000
SCALE 1.00×
SCL X 1.00×
SCL Y 1.00×
SCL Z 1.00×
Edits persist per-model — reload the same model and your bone fixes come back. With Motion=Animate these are correction offsets on the live rig; with Motion=Static you pose from rest.
Load a GLB with blend shapes, then REFRESH. Mix the shapes to build any expression — happy, angry, pain, or blends of several at once.
SAVE EXPRESSION AS
LOAD EXPRESSION
Saved per-model & persistent. To ANIMATE a face over a move, keyframe it in STUDIO (same flow as bones).
Measured from the rig skeleton, normalized to a real pro-wrestler scale (1.88m). Override per fighter — the grip math & IK read these values.
—
REACH SCALE — 1.00
GRIP SCALE — 1.00
REACH scales arm/IK reach; GRIP scales hand-to-target distance. Saved per fighter.
Live feel dials for the procedural fighters. Strike dials default to 1.0 (no change) — push toward snappy/heavy for UFC, big/slow for WWE. Applies to both fighters in real fights.
STANCE (idle presence)
READY BOUNCE 0.6
GUARD TIGHTNESS 0.4
WEIGHT SWAY 0.5
STRIKES (kinetic chain)
STRIKE SPEED 1
WINDUP DEPTH 1
WEIGHT TRANSFER 1
HIP ROTATION 1
Load a GLB model in FIGHTER MODELS, then REFRESH.
Show/hide a model's mesh pieces — drop a jacket, mask, helmet or armor layer for a second look. Persists per-model.
BACKUP / TRANSFER
BANNON STUDIO
EDIT A MOVE'S ANIMATION
Pick a move to load its animation here (or start a fresh one), edit the keyframes, then SAVE CLIP — it saves straight back onto that move. ⚙ = procedural (no clip yet), ▶ = has an animation.
SELECT JOINT TO POSE
FWD / BACK 0.00
UP / DOWN 0.00
SIDE (L / R) 0.00
MODEL BONES — pose the loaded model's own skeleton, then SET KEYFRAME
ROT X 0°
ROT Y 0°
ROT Z 0°
MOVE X 0.000
MOVE Y 0.000
MOVE Z 0.000
SCALE 1.00×
SCL X 1.00×
SCL Y 1.00×
SCL Z 1.00×
TIMELINE
SCRUB 0.00s
CLIP LENGTH 1.00s
CLIP NAME
SAVED ANIMATIONS — tap LOAD to edit
MOCAP IMPORT (.glb)
Attach a clip to a move in MOVE FORGE — a new CUSTOM ANIMATION row lists your clips. The move still lands its hit from its POWER / LIMB / HEIGHT; the clip only drives the body. Impact lands around the middle of the animation, so design the strike to peak there.
TUNING PRESETS — snapshot of CREATIVE CONTROL
BACKUP / TRANSFER
Everything (clips + presets) is auto-saved in this browser when possible. To move it between devices or keep a backup, EXPORT the code below and paste it into IMPORT elsewhere.
FIGHTER MODELS

AI reads the live BANNON code. Ask anything. Get patches back with Apply button.
Ask anything about BANNON. The AI has the live game code.
Tap scan to analyze the live game code
Session Memory (survives tab changes)
No memory yet. Build and chat sessions are remembered here.
Version History
BANNON PREVIEW
// ============================================================================ // BRICK 117: ADVANCED KINEMATICS, JOINT LOCKS & DEEP COMBAT // ============================================================================ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; // --- Capoeira & Archetypal Stance Offsets --- const _origGuard = Fighter.prototype.poseGuard; if (_origGuard) { Fighter.prototype.poseGuard = function(dt, walking) { _origGuard.apply(this, arguments); if (!this.J) return; const style = this.style ? this.style.toUpperCase() : 'ORTHODOX'; const isCapoeira = style === 'CAPOEIRA'; // Stance offsets let sx = 0, sy = 0, sz = 0; if (style === 'SOUTHPAW') { sx = -0.15; sz = -0.1; } else if (style === 'BRAWLER') { sy = -0.15; sx = 0.1; } else if (style === 'MUAY_THAI') { sy = 0.15; sz = 0.05; } else if (style === 'LUCHA') { sy = -0.1; sx = 0.1; } else if (style === 'TECHNICIAN') { sy = -0.1; sx = -0.1; } if (!isCapoeira && (sx||sy||sz)) { if (this.J.haL) { this.J.haL.tgt.x += sx; this.J.haL.tgt.y += sy; this.J.haL.tgt.z += sz; } if (this.J.haR) { this.J.haR.tgt.x -= sx; this.J.haR.tgt.y -= sy; this.J.haR.tgt.z -= sz; } } // Capoeira Constant Locomotion (Ginga) if (isCapoeira) { const p = this.walkPhase || 0; if (Math.abs(this.wantMove||0) < 0.1) this.walkPhase = (this.walkPhase || 0) + dt * 2.0; const hipS = Math.sin(p) * 0.28; const hipD = 0.15 + Math.abs(Math.cos(p * 2)) * 0.15; if (this.J.pelvis) { this.J.pelvis.tgt.x += hipS * 0.3; this.J.pelvis.tgt.y -= hipD; this.J.pelvis.tgt.z += hipS * 1.2; } if (this.J.haL) { this.J.haL.tgt.set(0.4, 0.7, 0.3); } if (this.J.haR) { this.J.haR.tgt.set(0.4, 0.7, -0.3); } if (this.J.head) { this.J.head.tgt.x += 0.1; this.J.head.tgt.z -= hipS * 0.4; } } }; } // --- Capoeira Inverted Kinematics (Attacks) --- const _origAttack = Fighter.prototype.poseAttack; if (_origAttack) { Fighter.prototype.poseAttack = function(dt) { _origAttack.apply(this, arguments); if (!this.J || !this.attackData) return; const m = this.attackData; if (this.style === 'CAPOEIRA' && m.limb && m.limb.includes('KICK')) { const p = Math.max(0.001, Math.min(this.attackPhase || 0, 1.0)); const sweepAngle = p * Math.PI * 2; const isLeft = m.limb.includes('LEFT'); const kf = isLeft ? 'ftL' : 'ftR'; const plantHand = isLeft ? 'haR' : 'haL'; const r = this.reachScale || 1.0; if (p < 0.8 && this.J[kf]) { this.J[kf].tgt.x += Math.cos(sweepAngle) * 0.8 * r; this.J[kf].tgt.z += Math.sin(sweepAngle) * 0.8 * r; this.J[kf].tgt.y += 0.8; } if (this.J.pelvis) this.J.pelvis.tgt.y -= 0.3; if (this.J.chest) this.J.chest.tgt.y -= 0.4; if (this.J[plantHand]) this.J[plantHand].tgt.set(0.1, 0.05, 0.3); } }; } // --- Mass Delta Resistance in Lifts --- const _origDeliver = Fighter.prototype.poseDeliver; if (_origDeliver) { Fighter.prototype.poseDeliver = function(dt) { _origDeliver.apply(this, arguments); const opp = (typeof fighters !== 'undefined') ? fighters[1 - this.idx] : null; if (!opp) return; // Submission Hyperextension Logics if (this.grapplePos && this.grapplePos.includes('SUBMISSION')) { const isArm = this.grapplePos.includes('ARMBAR'); const tgt = isArm ? 'elR' : 'knR'; if (opp.J && opp.J[tgt]) { opp.J[tgt].tgt.y = 1.3 + ((this.stateTime || 0) * 0.2); if (opp.stamina > 0) opp.stamina -= dt * 15; } } // Lift Resistance based on mass ratio if (this._gPhase !== undefined && this._gPhase > 0.1 && this._gPhase < 0.9) { const n1 = this.opts && this.opts.name ? this.opts.name.toUpperCase() : 'BANNON'; const n2 = opp.opts && opp.opts.name ? opp.opts.name.toUpperCase() : 'BANNON'; const wMe = ROSTER_SPEC[n1] ? ROSTER_SPEC[n1].weight : 90; const wOpp = ROSTER_SPEC[n2] ? ROSTER_SPEC[n2].weight : 90; if (wMe < wOpp - 10 && opp.root) { const penalty = (wOpp - wMe) / 100.0; opp.root.position.y -= penalty * Math.abs(Math.sin((this.stateTime||0)*15)); // struggle } } }; } // --- Deepen Combat (Hitstop & CA) --- window._hitstopTicks = 0; const _origAD = window.applyDamage; if (_origAD) { window.applyDamage = function(defender, dmg, attacker, move, isGround) { const res = _origAD(defender, dmg, attacker, move, isGround); if (dmg >= 8) { window._hitstopTicks = Math.min(12, Math.floor(dmg / 3)); const canvas = document.querySelector('canvas'); if (canvas) { canvas.style.transition = 'none'; const dx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * dmg * 0.4; const dy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * dmg * 0.4; canvas.style.transform = `translate(${dx}px, ${dy}px)`; canvas.style.filter = `drop-shadow(${dmg*0.5}px 0 0 rgba(255,20,0,0.6)) drop-shadow(-${dmg*0.5}px 0 0 rgba(0,255,255,0.6)) saturate(1.5)`; setTimeout(() => { canvas.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s ease-out, filter 0.1s ease-out'; canvas.style.transform = 'translate(0px, 0px)'; canvas.style.filter = 'none'; }, window._hitstopTicks * 16 + 30); } // Spine/Hip Recoil boost if (defender.J) { if (defender.J.chest) defender.J.chest.tgt.x -= dmg * 0.02; if (defender.J.spineMid) defender.J.spineMid.tgt.x -= dmg * 0.01; if (defender.J.head) defender.J.head.tgt.x -= dmg * 0.025; if (defender.J.pelvis) defender.J.pelvis.tgt.x += dmg * 0.01; // opposing torque } } return res; }; } // Intercept the main update loop to apply hitstop frame freezing const _origUpdate = Fighter.prototype.update; if (_origUpdate) { Fighter.prototype.update = function(dt) { if (window._hitstopTicks > 0) { if (this.idx === 0) window._hitstopTicks--; // Apply visual jitter during freeze if (this.root && this.state !== 'down' && !this.ragdoll) { this.root.position.x += (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.02; } return; } _origUpdate.apply(this, arguments); }; } // --- Lock Joints (Ragdoll Angle Enforcement) --- const _origUpdateRagdoll = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUpdateRagdoll) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUpdateRagdoll.apply(this, arguments); if (!this.V) return; // Project vectors to enforce hinge limits const enforceHinge = (P1, P2, P3, isKnee, isRight) => { if (!P1 || !P2 || !P3) return; const v1x = P1.pos.x - P2.pos.x, v1y = P1.pos.y - P2.pos.y, v1z = P1.pos.z - P2.pos.z; const v2x = P3.pos.x - P2.pos.x, v2y = P3.pos.y - P2.pos.y, v2z = P3.pos.z - P2.pos.z; // Dot product to test angle const len1 = Math.sqrt(v1x*v1x + v1y*v1y + v1z*v1z); const len2 = Math.sqrt(v2x*v2x + v2y*v2y + v2z*v2z); if (len1===0 || len2===0) return; const dot = (v1x*v2x + v1y*v2y + v1z*v2z) / (len1 * len2); // The cross product determines the bend direction (forward vs backward) const crx = v1y*v2z - v1z*v2y; const crz = v1x*v2y - v1y*v2x; // Very basic correction: If knee bends forward over a threshold, push the knee back along its local Z if (isKnee) { // In default pose, +Z is forward. If joint buckles forward, push it back. if (crx > 0 && dot > 0.1) { P2.pos.z -= 0.05 * (dot); if (P2.old) P2.old.z = P2.pos.z; } } else { // Elbows bending backwards if (crx < 0 && dot > 0.1) { P2.pos.z += 0.05 * (dot); if (P2.old) P2.old.z = P2.pos.z; } } }; enforceHinge(this.V['hipL'], this.V['knL'], this.V['ftL'], true, false); enforceHinge(this.V['hipR'], this.V['knR'], this.V['ftR'], true, true); enforceHinge(this.V['shL'], this.V['elL'], this.V['haL'], false, false); enforceHinge(this.V['shR'], this.V['elR'], this.V['haR'], false, true); }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'combat.joints_archetypes', kind: 'physics+gameplay', summary: 'Brick 117: Deepen combat (CA burst + spine torque + hitstop), Roster Archetypes (Capoeira Ginga & attacks, Southpaw/Brawler guard offsets), Submissions hyperextension lock, Mass Delta Hoist, and Verlet Joint Angle Locks.', call: 'ROSTER_SPEC augmentation + capoeira poseAttack + applyDamage hitstop/CA + enforceHinge' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON v117] JOINT LOCKS · DEEP COMBAT RECOIL · ROSTER ARCHETYPES · CAPOEIRA GINGA · HOIST MASS DELTA — injected', 'color:#00ffff;font-weight:bold'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — PER-FRAME BONE LENGTH ENFORCEMENT */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined' || typeof BONES === 'undefined' || typeof REST === 'undefined') return; const getRestDist = (b1, b2) => { const r1 = REST[b1], r2 = REST[b2]; if (!r1 || !r2) return null; const x1 = r1.x !== undefined ? r1.x : r1[0]; const y1 = r1.y !== undefined ? r1.y : r1[1]; const z1 = r1.z !== undefined ? r1.z : r1[2]; const x2 = r2.x !== undefined ? r2.x : r2[0]; const y2 = r2.y !== undefined ? r2.y : r2[1]; const z2 = r2.z !== undefined ? r2.z : r2[2]; return Math.sqrt((x1-x2)**2 + (y1-y2)**2 + (z1-z2)**2); }; const enforceLengths = (jointsArray) => { if (!jointsArray) return; for (let iter = 0; iter < 3; iter++) { // 3 iterations for rigid solve for (let i = 0; i < BONES.length; i++) { const bn1 = BONES[i][0]; const bn2 = BONES[i][1]; const j1 = jointsArray[bn1]; const j2 = jointsArray[bn2]; if (!j1 || !j2 || !j1.pos || !j2.pos) continue; const restDist = getRestDist(bn1, bn2); if (!restDist || restDist < 0.0001) continue; const dx = j1.pos.x - j2.pos.x; const dy = j1.pos.y - j2.pos.y; const dz = j1.pos.z - j2.pos.z; const curDist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy + dz*dz) || 0.0001; // strict length enforcement const diff = (curDist - restDist) / curDist; const moveDist = diff * 0.5; const px = dx * moveDist; const py = dy * moveDist; const pz = dz * moveDist; j1.pos.x -= px; j1.pos.y -= py; j1.pos.z -= pz; j2.pos.x += px; j2.pos.y += py; j2.pos.z += pz; } } }; const _origUpdate = Fighter.prototype.update; if (_origUpdate) { Fighter.prototype.update = function(dt) { _origUpdate.apply(this, arguments); if (this.J) enforceLengths(this.J); if (this.V) enforceLengths(this.V); }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'physics.bone_length_enforcement', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Brick: Per-frame bone length enforcement to correct the mesh stretching glitch during ragdoll/grappling.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.update post-layer length correction' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON] PER-FRAME BONE LENGTH ENFORCEMENT — injected', 'color:#ff00ff;font-weight:bold'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — BULK FBX ASSET LOADER & MOVEDEX REGISTRAR (WWE 2K26 STRUCTURE) */ (function() { window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY = async function() { if (typeof THREE.FBXLoader === 'undefined') { console.error('[BANNON FBX BATCH] FBXLoader must be loaded to batch-import assets.'); return; } const ASSETS = [ 'Action Idle To Standing Idle.fbx', 'Baseball Hit.fbx', 'Body Block.fbx', 'Box Idle.fbx', 'Boxing (1).fbx', 'Boxing (2).fbx', 'Boxing (3).fbx', 'Boxing.fbx', 'Brooklyn Uprock.fbx', 'Brutal Assassination.fbx', 'Capoeira (1).fbx', 'Capoeira.fbx', 'Center Block.fbx', 'Cross Jumps.fbx', 'Dancing.fbx', 'Death From Back Headshot.fbx', 'Defender.fbx', 'Double Leg Takedown - Victim.fbx', 'Drop Kick.fbx', 'Drunk Idle Variation.fbx', 'Drunk Walk.fbx', 'Fist Fight A.fbx', 'Flair.fbx', 'Goalkeeper Catch.fbx', 'Hurricane Kick.fbx', 'Idle.fbx', 'Illegal Elbow Punch (1).fbx', 'Illegal Elbow Punch.fbx', 'Inverted Double Kick To Kip Up.fbx', 'Jogging.fbx', 'Jump Attack.fbx', 'Jump.fbx', 'Jumping Down.fbx', 'Jumping.fbx', 'Kick To The Groin (1).fbx', 'Kick To The Groin.fbx', 'Mma Kick.fbx', 'Mutant Roaring.fbx', 'Pivot.fbx', 'Playing Drums.fbx', 'Punching Bag.fbx', 'Punching.fbx', 'Ready Idle.fbx', 'Running (1).fbx', 'Running Jump.fbx', 'Running.fbx', 'Sad Walk.fbx', 'Singing.fbx', 'Skateboarding.fbx', 'Snake Hip Hop Dance.fbx', 'Soccer Spin.fbx', 'Stable Sword Inward Slash.fbx', 'Standard Run.fbx', 'Standing Block Start.fbx', 'Standing Cover To Cover.fbx', 'Standing Melee Attack Horizontal.fbx', 'Standing React Large From Left.fbx', 'Standing Taunt Battlecry.fbx', 'Standing Turn Right 90.fbx', 'Standing Walk Left.fbx', 'Strut Walking.fbx', 'Swinging.fbx', 'Sword And Shield Attack.fbx', 'Sword And Shield Power Up.fbx', 'Taunt.fbx', 'Terrified.fbx', 'Treadmill Running.fbx', 'Two Handed Sword Death.fbx', 'Unarmed Idle Looking Ver. 2.fbx', 'Walk Backward.fbx', 'Walk Crouching Backward Right.fbx', 'Walking (1).fbx', 'Walking Backward.fbx', 'Walking Backwards (1).fbx', 'Walking Backwards.fbx', 'Walking.fbx', 'Zombie Dying.fbx', 'Zombie Punching.fbx' ]; console.log(`[FBX BATCH] Starting bulk import of ${ASSETS.length} FBX files...`); const loader = new THREE.FBXLoader(); let loadedCount = 0; // Ensure MOVEDEX and STUDIO clips are instantiated if (typeof STUDIO === 'undefined') window.STUDIO = { clips: {} }; STUDIO.clips = STUDIO.clips || {}; for (const file of ASSETS) { try { const response = await fetch('/' + encodeURIComponent(file)); if (!response.ok) continue; const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer(); const clipName = file.replace(/\.fbx$/i, '').toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g, '_'); // Parse synchronously here (could be chunked if UI freezes) const fbxObj = loader.parse(buffer, ''); if (fbxObj.animations && fbxObj.animations.length) { const clip = extractClipFromGLTF(fbxObj.animations[0], fbxObj); STUDIO.clips[clipName] = clip; loadedCount++; // Register in MOVEDEX dynamically based on heuristics if (window.MOVEDEX) { let cat = 'STRIKE'; let subcat = 'STRIKE'; if (file.toLowerCase().includes('kick')) subcat = 'KICK'; else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('punch') || file.toLowerCase().includes('boxing')) subcat = 'PUNCH'; else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('idle')) { cat = 'TAUNT'; subcat = 'IDLE'; } else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('taunt')) { cat = 'TAUNT'; subcat = 'TAUNT'; } else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('walk') || file.toLowerCase().includes('run')) { cat = 'TAUNT'; subcat = 'LOCOMOTION'; } else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('victim') || file.toLowerCase().includes('react')) { cat = 'REACTION'; subcat = 'HIT_REACT'; } const customMove = { name: clipName, cat: cat, limb: 'BODY', traj: 'STRAIGHT', height: 'MID', power: 75, speed: 60, style: 'MOCAP', follow: 'RESET STANCE', clip: clipName }; if (typeof customMoves !== 'undefined' && !customMoves.some(m => m.name === clipName)) { customMoves.push(customMove); } } } } catch(e) { console.warn(`[FBX BATCH] Failed to parse: ${file}`, e); } } console.log(`[FBX BATCH] Loaded ${loadedCount}/${ASSETS.length} FBX files into STUDIO clips and MOVEDEX.`); }; try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'mocap.bulk_load', kind: 'forge', summary: 'Batch loads root environment .fbx files directly into STUDIO.clips & MOVEDEX using WWE 2K category heuristics.', call: 'window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY()' }); } catch(e) {} })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 89 — NODE 4: SPATIAL ENVIRONMENT / OPAQUE ARENA SUITE */ (function() { window.BANNON_LOAD_ARENA_ASSETS = async function() { if (typeof THREE === 'undefined' || typeof THREE.FBXLoader === 'undefined') { console.error('[NODE 4] FBXLoader must be loaded to import arena assets.'); return; } const ARENA_ASSETS = [ 'uploads_files_2434745_ringsalefbx.fbx', 'uploads_files_4374447_Chair_steel.fbx' ]; console.log(`[NODE 4 - SPATIAL ENVIRONMENT] Starting bulk import of ${ARENA_ASSETS.length} Arena FBX files...`); const loader = new THREE.FBXLoader(); for (const file of ARENA_ASSETS) { try { const response = await fetch('/' + encodeURIComponent(file)); if (!response.ok) continue; const buffer = await response.arrayBuffer(); const fbx = loader.parse(buffer, ''); // Arena Placement Node Logic if (file.toLowerCase().includes('ring')) { fbx.scale.set(0.01, 0.01, 0.01); fbx.position.set(0, 0, 0); if (typeof arenaGroup !== 'undefined') arenaGroup.add(fbx); else if (typeof scene !== 'undefined') scene.add(fbx); console.log(`[NODE 4] Injected Arena Asset: ${file}`); // Implement strict frustum culling and lock static matrices for background props fbx.traverse((child) => { if (child.isMesh) { child.frustumCulled = true; // Disable auto-update for static background rendering boosts child.matrixAutoUpdate = false; child.updateMatrix(); } }); if (window.BPHYS && window.BPHYS.rebuildRing) { try { window.BPHYS.rebuildRing(); } catch (e) {} } } else if (file.toLowerCase().includes('chair')) { fbx.scale.set(0.015, 0.015, 0.015); fbx.position.set(4.5, 0, 4.5); // Place just outside the ropes if (typeof scene !== 'undefined') scene.add(fbx); console.log(`[NODE 4] Injected Prop Asset: ${file}`); } } catch (e) { console.warn(`[NODE 4] Failed to load arena asset ${file}:`, e); } } }; try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick89.node4_arena_suite', kind: 'spatial-environment', summary: 'Node 4 Spatial Environment (Arena & Props). Dedicated loader for rings and steel chairs separation.', call: 'window.BANNON_LOAD_ARENA_ASSETS()' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 89] NODE 4 SPATIAL ENVIRONMENT ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 90 — NODE 11: CREATION SUITE / CHARACTER ASSETS */ (function() { window.BANNON_LOAD_CHARACTER_ASSETS = async function() { if (typeof THREE === 'undefined' || typeof THREE.FBXLoader === 'undefined') { console.error('[NODE 11] FBXLoader must be loaded to import character assets.'); return; } const CHAR_ASSETS = [ // Extracted distinct character models (e.g. custom Titan/Cruiserweight rigs) will be arrayed here ]; console.log(`[NODE 11 - CREATION SUITE] Character Asset loader ready. Intercepting ${CHAR_ASSETS.length} files...`); // We will process these distinct models via the Creation Suite isolated scene, not the arena. }; try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick90.node11_character_suite', kind: 'creation-suite', summary: 'Node 11 Creation Suite. Dedicated parsing pathway for distinct fighter character models.', call: 'window.BANNON_LOAD_CHARACTER_ASSETS()' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 90] NODE 11 CREATION SUITE ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 91 — NODE 5 KINEMATIC CORE: WEAPON-GRIP IK CONSTRAINT */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolve = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolve) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { _origSolve.call(this); // Weapon Grip IK Constraint // If the fighter has a bound weapon (e.g. Steel Chair), forcibly pull the hands // to the local grip coordinates of the weapon mesh. if (this.weaponProp && this.J && this.J['haL'] && this.J['haR']) { // Ensure the weapon respects gravity/momentum natively or follows root if (this.weaponProp.matrixWorld) { const lHandTarget = new THREE.Vector3(-0.35, 0.1, 0.4).applyMatrix4(this.weaponProp.matrixWorld); const rHandTarget = new THREE.Vector3(0.35, 0.1, 0.4).applyMatrix4(this.weaponProp.matrixWorld); // Clamp hand positional data directly to the prop's spatial coordinates this.J['haL'].pos.lerp(lHandTarget, 0.85); this.J['haR'].pos.lerp(rHandTarget, 0.85); } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick91.weapon_grip_ik', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Node 5: Kinematic weapon-grip constraint. Hands visually and physically lock onto the coordinates of equipped props (like Steel Chairs) carrying real mass.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK weapon-grip' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 91] NODE 5 WEAPON-GRIP IK CONSTRAINT ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 92 — NODE 7 COMBAT AI: GOAL-ORIENTED ACTION PLANNING */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUpdateAI = Fighter.prototype.updateAI; if (_origUpdateAI) { Fighter.prototype.updateAI = function(dt) { // GOAP Predicate Evaluation (Before Behavior Tree execution) if (!this.isPlayer && this.parts && this.state !== 'attack' && this.state !== 'block') { const opp = this.opponent(); if (opp) { // GOAL: Protect damaged left/right leg autonomously if (this.parts.legL > 65 && this.stance !== 'southpaw') { this.stance = 'southpaw'; } else if (this.parts.legR > 65 && this.stance !== 'orthodox') { this.stance = 'orthodox'; } // GOAL: Assess arena coordinates to avoid getting cornered const arenaHalf = typeof ARENA_HALF !== 'undefined' ? ARENA_HALF : 3.5; const arenaHalfZ = typeof ARENA_HALF_Z !== 'undefined' ? ARENA_HALF_Z : 3.5; const distToRopeX = arenaHalf - Math.abs(this.x); const distToRopeZ = arenaHalfZ - Math.abs(this.z); if (distToRopeX < 1.0 || distToRopeZ < 1.0) { // AI realizes it is cornered; increase lateral movement priority this._cornerPanic = (this._cornerPanic || 0) + dt; if (this._cornerPanic > 1.5) { this.wantMove = 1; this._lastMoveIx = opp.x > 0 ? -1 : 1; this._lastMoveIz = opp.z > 0 ? -1 : 1; } } else { this._cornerPanic = 0; } // GOAL: Regulate cardiovascular output (Stamina Drops) if (this.stamina < 20) { this.aggressionFactor = 0.2; // Severely pull back attacks } else if (this.stamina > 80) { this.aggressionFactor = 1.2; // Unload } } } // Execute absolute fallback to unified BT or prior zone logic _origUpdateAI.call(this, dt); }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick92.node7_goap_ai', kind: 'combat-ai', summary: 'Node 7 Goal-Oriented Action Planning. AI dynamically reads stamina drops, local limb damage (auto-stance switching), and spatial coordinate trapping.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateAI goap-eval' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 92] NODE 7 COMBAT AI (GOAP) ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — VRM ANATOMICAL POLE VECTOR PROJECTION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origTwoBoneIK = Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK; if (!_origTwoBoneIK) return; Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK = function(sh, el, ha, a, b, pole) { if (!this.J || !this.J[sh] || !this.J[ha] || !this.J['spineLow'] || !this.J['chest'] || !this.J['shL'] || !this.J['shR']) { _origTwoBoneIK.call(this, sh, el, ha, a, b, pole); return; } // 1. Determine local body axis const up = new THREE.Vector3().subVectors(this.J['chest'].pos, this.J['spineLow'].pos).normalize(); let right = new THREE.Vector3().subVectors(this.J['shR'].pos, this.J['shL'].pos).normalize(); // Fallback if (right.lengthSq() < 0.1 || isNaN(right.x)) { const fxy = typeof this.forward === 'function' ? this.forward() : {x:0, z:-1}; right.set(fxy.z, 0, -fxy.x).normalize(); } if (up.lengthSq() < 0.1 || isNaN(up.x)) { up.set(0,1,0); } // 2. Anatomical forward (right hand rule correction) // up x right = forward const fwd = new THREE.Vector3().crossVectors(up, right); if (fwd.lengthSq() < 0.001) { fwd.set(0, 0, -1); // Failsafe } else { fwd.normalize(); } // 3. Project definitive pole tracking coordinate let dyPole = new THREE.Vector3(); if (sh === 'shL' || sh === 'shR') { // ELBOWS: Bend backward + outward + slightly down const isLeft = (sh === 'shL'); const out = right.clone().multiplyScalar(isLeft ? -1 : 1); dyPole.copy(fwd).multiplyScalar(-1.5); dyPole.add(out.multiplyScalar(0.7)); dyPole.add(up.multiplyScalar(-0.4)); pole = { x: dyPole.x, y: dyPole.y, z: dyPole.z }; } else if (sh === 'hipL' || sh === 'hipR') { // KNEES: Bend purely forward dyPole.copy(fwd).multiplyScalar(2.0); pole = { x: dyPole.x, y: dyPole.y, z: dyPole.z }; } _origTwoBoneIK.call(this, sh, el, ha, a, b, pole); }; try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'physics.vrm_pole_vector', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Brick: True VRM IK pole vectors dynamically locked using chest/spine cross products. Permanently fixes geometric backward arm/leg mesh inversions.', call: 'Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK pole override' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON] VRM ANATOMICAL POLE VECTORS — injected', 'color:#ff00ff;font-weight:bold'); })(); (function installBrick57(){ 'use strict'; if(window.__brick57) return; window.__brick57 = true; if(typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; // ── 1. DISABLE UNINTENTIONAL AUTO-ZONING ───────────────────────────────── // We surgically mask the velocity and inputs for the duration of the // updateZone call so the logic always sees a stationary fighter. This kills // the automatic walk-off while preserving the v93 wrappers and ZONE button. const _v93UpdateZone = Fighter.prototype.updateZone; if (typeof _v93UpdateZone === 'function') { Fighter.prototype.updateZone = function(dt) { // Save real movement data const _vx = this.vx, _vz = this.vz; const _ix = this._lastMoveIx, _iz = this._lastMoveIz; // Mask movement to neutralize auto-zone threshold timers this.vx = 0; this.vz = 0; this._lastMoveIx = 0; this._lastMoveIz = 0; _v93UpdateZone.call(this, dt); // Restore real movement data this.vx = _vx; this.vz = _vz; this._lastMoveIx = _ix; this._lastMoveIz = _iz; }; } // ── 2. PREVENT FLOOR CLIPPING UNDER THE RING MAT ───────────────────────── // Replaces _zoneClamp to enforce a hard exclusion zone. If a fighter is // legitimately in the 'FLOOR' zone, they are physically blocked from // walking back underneath the ring apron and clipping through the geometry. Fighter.prototype._zoneClamp = function() { const AH = ARENA_HALF, AHZ = (typeof ARENA_HALF_Z !== 'undefined' ? ARENA_HALF_Z : 2.2); // Allow transition animations (climbing in/out) to move freely across bounds if (this.state === 'apron' || this.state === 'ringIn' || this.state === 'ringOut') { const SAFE = AH * 1.6, SAFE_Z = AHZ * 1.6; this.x = clamp(this.x, -SAFE, SAFE); this.z = clamp(this.z, -SAFE_Z, SAFE_Z); return; } if (this.zone === 'APRON') { const side = this.apronSide || 'X+'; if (side === 'X+') { this.x = clamp(this.x, AH + 0.16, AH + 0.42); this.z = clamp(this.z, -AHZ, AHZ); } else if (side === 'X-') { this.x = clamp(this.x, -(AH + 0.42), -(AH + 0.16)); this.z = clamp(this.z, -AHZ, AHZ); } else if (side === 'Z+') { this.z = clamp(this.z, AHZ + 0.16, AHZ + 0.42); this.x = clamp(this.x, -AH, AH); } else { this.z = clamp(this.z, -(AHZ + 0.42), -(AHZ + 0.16)); this.x = clamp(this.x, -AH, AH); } } else if (this.zone === 'FLOOR') { const AW = 0.45; // Apron width outer limit const absX = Math.abs(this.x); const absZ = Math.abs(this.z); // Hard collision: block entry to the space under the ring + apron if (absX < AH + AW && absZ < AHZ + AW) { // Determine nearest valid escape edge and eject if ((AH + AW) - absX < (AHZ + AW) - absZ) { this.x = Math.sign(this.x || 1) * (AH + AW); } else { this.z = Math.sign(this.z || 1) * (AHZ + AW); } } // Outer floor bounds this.x = clamp(this.x, -(AH + 1.4), AH + 1.4); this.z = clamp(this.z, -(AHZ + 1.2), AHZ + 1.2); } else { // RING zone bounds this.x = clamp(this.x, -AH, AH); this.z = clamp(this.z, -AHZ, AHZ); } }; try{ window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick57.zone_fix', kind: 'physics-bounds', summary: 'Kills accidental auto-walk-off zoning by masking inputs during updateZone. Reinforces _zoneClamp so FLOOR fighters cannot clip under the ring mat.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateZone wrap, Fighter.prototype._zoneClamp replace' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 57] MAT CLIPPING & AUTO-ZONE FIX ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — RAGDOLL ANGULAR MOMENTUM TRANSFER */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; // 1. Store actual world joint positions every frame const _origUpdate = Fighter.prototype.update; if (_origUpdate) { Fighter.prototype.update = function(dt) { if (!this.ragdoll && this.J) { if (!this._prevWorldJ) this._prevWorldJ = {}; for (const j in this.J) { const wp = this.worldJoint(j); this._prevWorldJ[j] = wp; } } _origUpdate.call(this, dt); }; } // 2. Override seedRagdoll to inject that true velocity into Verlet nodes const _origSeed = Fighter.prototype.seedRagdoll; if (_origSeed) { Fighter.prototype.seedRagdoll = function() { _origSeed.call(this); // Let original set up V nodes, set ragdoll=true, etc. // Overgrowth Energy injection if (this.V && this._prevWorldJ) { for (const j in this.V) { if (this._prevWorldJ[j]) { const wp = this.worldJoint(j); const pwp = this._prevWorldJ[j]; // Calculate actual distance traveled in the last frame const dx = wp.x - pwp.x; const dy = wp.y - pwp.y; const dz = wp.z - pwp.z; // Limit the physical injection to prevent explosive velocity glitches const MAX_VEL = 0.5; // per frame max const vx = clamp(dx, -MAX_VEL, MAX_VEL); const vy = clamp(dy, -MAX_VEL, MAX_VEL); const vz = clamp(dz, -MAX_VEL, MAX_VEL); // Set the old coordinate backward so the verlet integrator // naturally throws the limb forward on the next physics step. this.V[j].old.x = wp.x - vx; this.V[j].old.y = wp.y - vy; this.V[j].old.z = wp.z - vz; } } } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'physics.angular_momentum_transfer', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Brick: Transfers true animated bone velocity directly into the Verlet ragdoll upon KO to preserve angular momentum.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.seedRagdoll velocity injection' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON] RAGDOLL ANGULAR MOMENTUM TRANSFER — injected', 'color:#ff00ff;font-weight:bold'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — RAYCAST-DRIVEN FOOT IK */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined' || typeof THREE === 'undefined') return; const _raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster(); const _down = new THREE.Vector3(0, -1, 0); // We patch solveFootIK to determine dynamic groundY via raycast const _origSolveFootIK = Fighter.prototype.solveFootIK; if (_origSolveFootIK) { Fighter.prototype.solveFootIK = function(dt, walking) { if (!this.J || !this.J['hipL'] || typeof rawScene === 'undefined') { _origSolveFootIK.call(this, dt, walking); return; } // Default let FP = (window.LOCO && window.LOCO.footPlant) || {}; let baselineGroundY = (FP.groundY != null ? FP.groundY : 0.05); // Perform a raycast straight down from the fighter's root/hips const origin = new THREE.Vector3(this.x, 2.0, this.z); _raycaster.set(origin, _down); // Assume rawScene holds the arena environment const intersects = _raycaster.intersectObject(rawScene, true); let dynamicGroundY = baselineGroundY; for (const hit of intersects) { // Exclude UI, helpers, and characters (keep it strictly environment) if (!hit.object.isFighter && !hit.object.userData.isHUD && hit.distance > 0) { dynamicGroundY = Math.max(baselineGroundY, hit.point.y + 0.05); break; } } // Temporarily override the LOCO groundY const oldGroundY = FP.groundY; if (!window.LOCO) window.LOCO = { footPlant: {} }; window.LOCO.footPlant.groundY = dynamicGroundY; _origSolveFootIK.call(this, dt, walking); // Restore if (oldGroundY !== undefined) { window.LOCO.footPlant.groundY = oldGroundY; } else { delete window.LOCO.footPlant.groundY; } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'physics.raycast_foot_ik', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Brick: Dynamic Raycast-Driven Foot IK. Replaces hardcoded floor planes with true vertical ray projections against rawScene geometry.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveFootIK dynamic groundY injection' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON] RAYCAST-DRIVEN FOOT IK — injected', 'color:#ff00ff;font-weight:bold'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK — NARROWPHASE MULTI-BODY COLLISION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUpdateRagdoll = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUpdateRagdoll) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUpdateRagdoll.call(this, dt); // Multi-body resolution: Check this ragdoll against ALL other fighters if (this.ragdoll && this.V && typeof fighters !== 'undefined') { const COLLISION_RADIUS = 0.25; const STIFFNESS = 0.4; for (const other of fighters) { if (other === this || !other.V) continue; // Simple particle-to-particle sweeping for narrowphase for (const keyA in this.V) { const vA = this.V[keyA]; for (const keyB in other.V) { const vB = other.V[keyB]; const dx = vB.pos.x - vA.pos.x; const dy = vB.pos.y - vA.pos.y; const dz = vB.pos.z - vA.pos.z; let dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy, dz); if (dist < COLLISION_RADIUS) { // Safeguard against NaN/Infinity repulsion explosions if (dist < 0.001) { dist = 0.001; } const overlap = COLLISION_RADIUS - dist; const resolve = (overlap / dist) * 0.5 * STIFFNESS; // Hard cap resolution velocity to prevent spaghetti limbs const maxResolve = 0.15; const ox = THREE.MathUtils.clamp(dx * resolve, -maxResolve, maxResolve); const oy = THREE.MathUtils.clamp(dy * resolve, -maxResolve, maxResolve); const oz = THREE.MathUtils.clamp(dz * resolve, -maxResolve, maxResolve); if (!vA.pinned) { vA.pos.x -= ox; vA.pos.y -= oy; vA.pos.z -= oz; } if (!vB.pinned) { vB.pos.x += ox; vB.pos.y += oy; vB.pos.z += oz; } } } } } } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'physics.narrowphase_multibody', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Brick: Narrowphase multi-body mass resolution. Dynamically resolves inter-character collisions via particle repulsion during ragdoll integration.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll narrowphase append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON] NARROWPHASE MULTI-BODY COLLISION — injected', 'color:#ff00ff;font-weight:bold'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 58 — OVERGROWTH VERLET VELOCITY CLAMP & SELF-COLLISION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUpdateRagdoll = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUpdateRagdoll) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUpdateRagdoll.call(this, dt); if (this.ragdoll && this.V && typeof RING !== 'undefined') { const MAX_BONE_VEL = 0.35; // Maximum biological travel distance per frame (~21 m/s) const floorHeight = (this.zone === 'FLOOR') ? RING.floorY - 0.85 : RING.floorY; for (const j in this.V) { const v = this.V[j]; if (v && v.pos && v.old && !v.pinned) { // 1. Kinetic Energy Limit (Velocity Clamp) // Kills the infinite phantom momentum loops that cause jitter / seizing const dx = v.pos.x - v.old.x; const dy = v.pos.y - v.old.y; const dz = v.pos.z - v.old.z; const spd = Math.hypot(dx, dy, dz); if (spd > MAX_BONE_VEL) { const scale = MAX_BONE_VEL / spd; v.old.x = v.pos.x - (dx * scale); v.old.y = v.pos.y - (dy * scale); v.old.z = v.pos.z - (dz * scale); } // 2. Anatomical Self-Collision (Chest vs Wrists/Elbows) // Stops limbs from tunneling through the torso and inverting the mesh if (this.V['chest'] && (j === 'wrL' || j === 'wrR' || j === 'elL' || j === 'elR' || j === 'haL' || j === 'haR')) { const chest = this.V['chest']; const cx = v.pos.x - chest.pos.x; const cy = v.pos.y - chest.pos.y; const cz = v.pos.z - chest.pos.z; const cDist = Math.hypot(cx, cy, cz); const MIN_DIST = 0.18; // Biological volume radius of the torso if (cDist < MIN_DIST && cDist > 0.001) { const overlap = (MIN_DIST - cDist) / cDist * 0.5; v.pos.x += cx * overlap; v.pos.y += cy * overlap; v.pos.z += cz * overlap; } } // 3. Absolute Floor Penetration Bailout if (v.pos.y < floorHeight + 0.04) { v.pos.y = floorHeight + 0.04; // Bleed 90% vertical velocity on hard impact v.old.y = v.pos.y - (v.pos.y - v.old.y) * 0.1; } } } } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick58.overgrowth_stability', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Caps maximum Verlet kinetic energy per frame and applies anatomical self-collision to stop limb inversion and jitter loops.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll velocity limit append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 58] OVERGROWTH KINETIC CAP & SELF-COLLISION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 59 — EUPHORIA SELF-PRESERVATION (ACTIVE FALL BRACING) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // Active Ragdoll Muscular Bracing (Euphoria Paradigm) // Characters don't just go limp. They brace for impact, reaching hands // toward the ground and tucking the head upward to prevent trauma. if (this.ragdoll && this.V && this.downStage < 1.0) { const chest = this.V['chest']; const pelvis = this.V['pelvis']; const head = this.V['head']; // Stamina determines how hard the fighter works to brace const stamina = (this.stamina != null) ? this.stamina : 100; const awareness = Math.max(0, Math.min(1.0, stamina / 50.0)); if (awareness > 0.05 && chest && pelvis) { // Determine physical falling velocity if (chest.pos && chest.old) { const vy = chest.pos.y - chest.old.y; // Trigger panic bracing if actively falling fast or thrown if (vy < -0.015 || this.state === 'falling') { // Calculate skeletal facing direction (using Verlet world nodes) const sz = Math.sign(chest.pos.z - pelvis.pos.z) || 1; const sx = Math.sign(chest.pos.x - pelvis.pos.x) || 1; // 1. Hands reach down and array to break the fall for (const h of ['haL', 'haR']) { const hand = this.V[h]; if (hand && !hand.pinned && hand.pos) { hand.pos.y -= 0.06 * awareness; // Reach toward floor hand.pos.x += sx * 0.03 * awareness; // Spread out to catch weight hand.pos.z += sz * 0.03 * awareness; } } // 2. Neck Bracing Reflex (pull head up and back to avoid mat collision) if (head && !head.pinned && head.pos && head.old) { head.pos.y += 0.04 * awareness; // Pull up against gravity head.pos.x -= sx * 0.02 * awareness; // Pull back head.pos.z -= sz * 0.02 * awareness; // Dampen head velocity natively (stiffen neck muscles) head.old.x = head.old.x + (head.pos.x - head.old.x) * (0.1 * awareness); head.old.y = head.old.y + (head.pos.y - head.old.y) * (0.1 * awareness); head.old.z = head.old.z + (head.pos.z - head.old.z) * (0.1 * awareness); } // 3. Fetal Knee Tuck (pull knees up toward chest) for (const k of ['knL', 'knR']) { const knee = this.V[k]; if (knee && !knee.pinned && knee.pos) { knee.pos.y += 0.03 * awareness; knee.pos.x += sx * 0.02 * awareness; knee.pos.z += sz * 0.02 * awareness; } } } } } } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick59.euphoria_bracing', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Euphoria-style active fall bracing. Verlet nodes (hands, head, knees) autonomously contract toward defensive postures when falling in ragdoll state.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 59] EUPHORIA FALL BRACING ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 60 — KINEMATIC STRIKE RETARGETING & GOAL-ORIENTED STANCES */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _v3 = typeof THREE !== 'undefined' ? new THREE.Vector3() : null; // 1. Kinematic Target Tracking (Magnetic Homing for Strikes) const _origSolveIK = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolveIK && _v3) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { // Execute original kinematics first _origSolveIK.call(this); // Height and Angle Retargeting during strike execution if (this.state === 'attack' && this.attackData && this.attackPhase > 0.20 && this.attackPhase < 0.95) { const isLeft = this.attackData.limb && this.attackData.limb.includes('LEFT'); const hand = isLeft ? this.J.haL : this.J.haR; const opp = typeof this.opponent === 'function' ? this.opponent() : null; if (opp && opp.worldJoint && !this._whiffed && hand && hand.tgt && this.root) { // Lock onto height-appropriate limb based on move category const isHigh = this.attackData.height === 'HIGH' || this.attackData.height === 'OVERHEAD'; const tBoneName = isHigh ? 'head' : 'chest'; const worldHitbox = opp.worldJoint(tBoneName); if (worldHitbox) { _v3.copy(worldHitbox); this.root.updateMatrixWorld(true); this.root.worldToLocal(_v3); // Convert opponent bone into attacker's local coordinate space // Calculate magnetic pull based on strike temporal phase (peaks right before impact) const magPeak = Math.max(0, 1.0 - Math.abs(this.attackPhase - 0.75) * 3.5); const dx = _v3.x - hand.tgt.x; const dy = _v3.y - hand.tgt.y; const dz = _v3.z - hand.tgt.z; // Only auto-correct if within plausible biological range (don't stretch arms 3 meters) const distToTarget = Math.hypot(dx, dy, dz); if (distToTarget < 1.2) { // Interpolate the hand's kinematic target toward the opponent's actual bone mesh hand.tgt.y += dy * magPeak * 0.70; // Highly prioritize Y axis to fix short/tall gaps hand.tgt.x += dx * magPeak * 0.40; hand.tgt.z += dz * magPeak * 0.40; } } } } }; } // 2. Goal-Oriented Action Planning (Injury Stance Swap) const _origUpdate = Fighter.prototype.update; if (_origUpdate) { Fighter.prototype.update = function(dt) { _origUpdate.call(this, dt); // Autonomous Posture Protection if (this.parts && this.state !== 'down' && !this.ragdoll && this.root) { // Sum critical damage per side const leftDanger = (this.parts.legL || 100) + (this.parts.armL || 100); const rightDanger = (this.parts.legR || 100) + (this.parts.armR || 100); // Determine protective torque let offsetGoal = 0; if (leftDanger < rightDanger - 40 && leftDanger < 120) { offsetGoal = 0.45; // Angle left side away from opponent } else if (rightDanger < leftDanger - 40 && rightDanger < 120) { offsetGoal = -0.45; // Angle right side away from opponent } if (offsetGoal !== 0) { if (!this._injuryOffset) this._injuryOffset = 0; // Smooth blend this._injuryOffset += (offsetGoal - this._injuryOffset) * Math.min(1.0, dt * 2.0); // Apply directly to rendering root (overrides standard base orientation slightly) this.root.rotation.y += this._injuryOffset; } } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick60.kinematic_retargeting', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Goal-oriented Stance Selection (Southpaw shifting for limb protection) and Kinematic Height Retargeting for strikes (arms magnetically correct trajectory to strike actual bone coordinates of different-sized opponents).', call: 'Fighter.prototype.update / solveLimbIK append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 60] KINEMATIC STRIKE RETARGETING & GOAL-ORIENTED STANCES ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 61 — EXANIMA CENTER OF MASS WEAPONIZATION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolveIK = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolveIK) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { _origSolveIK.call(this); // Exanima-style Kinetic Pelvis Counter-Torque // A real punch doesn't just move the arm; the pelvis shifts oppositely to anchor the center of mass. if (this.state === 'attack' && this.attackPhase > 0.1 && this.attackPhase < 0.8 && this.attackData && this.J) { const isLeft = this.attackData.limb && this.attackData.limb.includes('LEFT'); const hand = isLeft ? this.J.haL : this.J.haR; const shoulder = isLeft ? this.J.shL : this.J.shR; const dx = hand.pos.x - shoulder.pos.x; const dz = hand.pos.z - shoulder.pos.z; // Power delivery phase (hips fire into the strike) if (this.attackPhase > 0.3 && hand.tgt) { const kineticSnap = Math.sin((this.attackPhase - 0.3) / 0.5 * Math.PI); // Arc from 0 to 1 to 0 // Push pelvis opposite to the arm extension to simulate weight transfer if (this.J.pelvis && this.J.chest && this.J.pelvis.tgt && this.J.chest.tgt) { this.J.pelvis.tgt.x -= dx * 0.15 * kineticSnap; this.J.pelvis.tgt.z -= dz * 0.15 * kineticSnap; // Chest leans into the strike this.J.chest.tgt.x += dx * 0.12 * kineticSnap; this.J.chest.tgt.z += dz * 0.12 * kineticSnap; } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick61.exanima_kinetics', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Center of mass weaponization. Calculates pelvis counter-torque during strikes to generate raw physical momentum instead of floating arms.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK pelvis inverse snap' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 61] EXANIMA CENTER OF MASS WEAPONIZATION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 62 — EUPHORIA INVERTED PENDULUM BALANCING */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origStumble = Fighter.prototype._tickStumble; if (_origStumble) { Fighter.prototype._tickStumble = function(dt) { _origStumble.call(this, dt); if (this._stumbleMag > 0.01 && this.J && this.state !== 'down' && !this.ragdoll) { // Euphoria Inverted Pendulum Math // Calculate the center of mass (chest/lumbar) relative to the feet const leftFoot = this.J.ftL.pos; const rightFoot = this.J.ftR.pos; const chest = this.J.chest.pos; const midFootX = (leftFoot.x + rightFoot.x) * 0.5; const midFootZ = (leftFoot.z + rightFoot.z) * 0.5; const comOffsetX = chest.x - midFootX; const comOffsetZ = chest.z - midFootZ; // PD Controller pulling chest back over the feet const pGain = 1.8; const correctiveX = -comOffsetX * pGain * dt; const correctiveZ = -comOffsetZ * pGain * dt; // Apply torque forces to spine nodes to fight falling over if (this.J.chest) { this.J.chest.x += correctiveX; this.J.chest.z += correctiveZ; } if (this.J.head) { this.J.head.x += correctiveX * 1.5; // Head overcorrects (whiplash stabilization) this.J.head.z += correctiveZ * 1.5; } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick62.euphoria_pendulum', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Euphoria-style inverted pendulum PD balancing. Dynamically pulls the center of mass (chest/head) back over the feet during stagger states.', call: 'Fighter.prototype._tickStumble append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 62] EUPHORIA INVERTED PENDULUM BALANCE ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 63 — BULLET PHYSICS CONE-TWIST JOINT LOCKS */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // Strict Cone-Twist Joint Clamping (Bullet Physics Math) if (this.ragdoll && this.V) { // Function to enforce that Node C stays within a safe angle relative to A-B bone const enforceConeTwist = (nodeA, nodeB, nodeC, safeAngleDeg, dirMask) => { if (!this.V[nodeA] || !this.V[nodeB] || !this.V[nodeC]) return; const A = this.V[nodeA]; const B = this.V[nodeB]; const C = this.V[nodeC]; // Vector from B to C (e.g. elbow to hand) const vx = C.pos.x - B.pos.x; const vy = C.pos.y - B.pos.y; const vz = C.pos.z - B.pos.z; const fwd = typeof this.forward === 'function' ? this.forward() : {x: 0, z: -1}; const vzLocal = vx * fwd.x + vz * fwd.z; // Project to forward axis const vxLocal = vx * -fwd.z + vz * fwd.x; // Project to right axis // Knees bend forward (positive vzLocal is bad if lower leg goes backward from upper leg? No, knees bend forward, so lower leg bends backward relative to the thigh. So V shape forms backward) // Actually, the lower leg should not bend FORWARD of the knee. `vzLocal > 0.05` is bad. if (dirMask === 'KNEE') { if (vzLocal > 0.05) { const penalty = (vzLocal - 0.05) * 0.4; C.pos.x -= fwd.x * penalty; C.pos.z -= fwd.z * penalty; if (C.old) { C.old.x = C.pos.x; C.old.z = C.pos.z; } } } // Elbows bend backward. Lower arm should not bend FORWARD of elbow. But wait, elbows bend backward/inward. So `vzLocal > 0.05` might also be bad. if (dirMask === 'ELBOW') { if (vzLocal > 0.05) { const penalty = (vzLocal - 0.05) * 0.4; C.pos.x -= fwd.x * penalty; C.pos.z -= fwd.z * penalty; if (C.old) { C.old.x = C.pos.x; C.old.z = C.pos.z; } } } }; enforceConeTwist('hipL', 'knL', 'ftL', 20, 'KNEE'); enforceConeTwist('hipR', 'knR', 'ftR', 20, 'KNEE'); enforceConeTwist('shL', 'elL', 'haL', 20, 'ELBOW'); enforceConeTwist('shR', 'elR', 'haR', 20, 'ELBOW'); } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick63.bullet_cone_twist', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Bullet Physics style Cone-Twist Joint Limits limits. Prevents unnatural reverse-bending of elbows and knees dynamically in the Verlet solver.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 63] BULLET CONE-TWIST JOINT LOCKS ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 64 — JOLT PHYSICS MATERIAL SLIPPAGE (SWEAT) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origPoseGrab = Fighter.prototype.poseGrab; if (_origPoseGrab) { Fighter.prototype.poseGrab = function(dt) { _origPoseGrab.call(this, dt); // Sweat Friction Slipping // When grappling for an extended period, heavy sweat (low stamina) causes the grip to slide. if (this.grappling && this.grabTarget && this.grappleStage >= 1 && this.grappleStage < 4) { const opp = this.grabTarget; const myStam = (this.stamina != null) ? this.stamina : 100; const oppStam = (opp.stamina != null) ? opp.stamina : 100; const fatigueFactor = 1.0 - (myStam / 100.0); const sweatFactor = 1.0 - (oppStam / 100.0); // If both are exhausted and sweating heavily, there is a chance the grip slips if (fatigueFactor > 0.5 && sweatFactor > 0.5) { // Apply micro-slips to the opponent's Y lock to simulate fighting for a sweaty grip const sweatVariance = Math.random() * (fatigueFactor * sweatFactor * 0.05); if (this._lockY != null) { this._lockY -= sweatVariance; // Target slowly sinks out of grip // If the target drops dangerously low, break the grip entirely if (this.grappleStage !== 1 && this._lockY < 0.2) { // Jolt physics material slip failure if (this._gripStrain != null) this._gripStrain += 50; // Force an immediate break } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick64.jolt_friction', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Jolt Physics local friction overrides. Grapple holds dynamically slip and lose lock altitude based on inverse stamina values (simulating heavy sweat and muscle fatigue).', call: 'Fighter.prototype.poseGrab append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 64] JOLT PHYSICS GRAPPLE FRICTION (SWEAT) ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 65 — GISH VOLUME PRESERVATION (SQUASH & STRETCH) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); // Gish Volume Preservation Math // When flesh takes impact, it doesn't just disappear; the volume displaces laterally. if (dmg > 5 && this.root && this.root.scale) { let maxSquash = Math.min(0.2, dmg / 50.0); // Temporarily warp the mesh scale (volume preserved: scaleY * scaleX * scaleZ = 1.0) this._volumeSquashTarget = maxSquash; } }; } const _origUpdate = Fighter.prototype.update; if (_origUpdate) { Fighter.prototype.update = function(dt) { _origUpdate.call(this, dt); if (this.root && this.root.scale) { if (!this._volumeSquashAmount) this._volumeSquashAmount = 0; if (!this._volumeSquashTarget) this._volumeSquashTarget = 0; // Spring toward target squash (instant compress, slow release) if (this._volumeSquashAmount < this._volumeSquashTarget) { this._volumeSquashAmount += (this._volumeSquashTarget - this._volumeSquashAmount) * 0.8; } else { // Decay target back to zero this._volumeSquashTarget = 0; this._volumeSquashAmount += (0 - this._volumeSquashAmount) * 0.15; // Slow return to normal } // Apply Volume Preservation // If Y is compressed by X%, X and Z must expand to maintain the volume const squash = this._volumeSquashAmount; const scaleY = 1.0 - squash; // Clamp scaleY to prevent dividing by 0 const safeScaleY = Math.max(0.1, scaleY); const scaleXZ = Math.sqrt(1.0 / safeScaleY); this.root.scale.set(scaleXZ, safeScaleY, scaleXZ); } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick65.gish_volume', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Gish volume preservation algorithm. Hard impacts compress the physical mesh on the Y axis while mathematically bulging the X and Z axes to preserve biological mass.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit / update append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 65] GISH VOLUME PRESERVATION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 66 — RIGS OF RODS SOFT BODY CANVAS DEFORMATION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { // Local canvas deformation state if (!this._canvasDepression) this._canvasDepression = 0; let maxImpact = 0; if (this.V && this.zone === 'RING') { // Check for heavy spinal impacts on the floor const chest = this.V['chest']; if (chest && chest.pos && chest.old) { const vy = chest.pos.y - chest.old.y; // Floor height const floorY = typeof RING !== 'undefined' ? RING.floorY : 0; if (chest.pos.y < floorY + 0.3 && vy < -0.05) { maxImpact = Math.abs(vy); } } } // Deform the canvas locally if (maxImpact > 0.05) { this._canvasDepression += maxImpact * 0.4; } // Rigs of Rods Damped Harmonic Oscillator (Spring) const k = 15.0; // Stiffness const d = 3.0; // Damping const accel = -k * this._canvasDepression - d * (this._canvasVelocity || 0); this._canvasVelocity = (this._canvasVelocity || 0) + accel * dt; this._canvasDepression += this._canvasVelocity * dt; // Prevent canvas from bouncing above resting height if (this._canvasDepression < 0) { this._canvasDepression = 0; this._canvasVelocity = 0; } // Tell floor solver to let the fighter sink into this temporary depression const _origRagFloorOffset = window._v98_ragFloorOffset || 0; window._v98_ragFloorOffset = _origRagFloorOffset - this._canvasDepression; _origUR.call(this, dt); // Restore window._v98_ragFloorOffset = _origRagFloorOffset; }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick66.rigs_of_rods_canvas', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Rigs of Rods soft body deformation. The ring canvas acts as a damped harmonic oscillator, physically absorbing heavy slams by temporarily depressing beneath the fighter rather than acting like concrete.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 66] RIGS OF RODS SOFT BODY CANVAS ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 67 — XASH3D SPATIAL PREDICTION (FOOT PLANTING) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // Xash3D Movement Prediction if (this.V && this.ragdoll) { const floorY = (this.zone === 'FLOOR' && typeof RING !== 'undefined') ? RING.floorY - 0.85 : (typeof RING !== 'undefined' ? RING.floorY : 0); for (const ft of ['ftL', 'ftR', 'knL', 'knR', 'head']) { const v = this.V[ft]; if (v && v.pos && v.old && !v.pinned) { const vy = v.pos.y - v.old.y; // If moving downward rapidly if (vy < -0.02) { // Predict position 3 frames in the future const projectedY = v.pos.y + (vy * 3.0); // If the projection clips through the floor if (projectedY < floorY) { // Apply immediate deceleration force natively to the Verlet integrator // to ensure a soft plant rather than a violent tunnel-clip const penetrationRisk = floorY - projectedY; v.old.y -= penetrationRisk * 0.15; // Bleed velocity early } } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick67.xash3d_prediction', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Xash3D movement prediction matrices. Computes projected vertex coordinates 3 frames into the future and decelerates limbs before they can tunnel through the floor plane.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 67] XASH3D SPATIAL MOVEMENT PREDICTION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 68 — PROJECT CHRONO BIOMECHANICAL FATIGUE */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolveIK = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolveIK) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { // Execute standard kinematic targets _origSolveIK.call(this); // Project Chrono Biological Torque Decay // Arms lift slower and drop heavier as the stamina pool drains if (this.J && this.stamina != null) { const exhaustLvl = Math.max(0, 1.0 - (this.stamina / 100)); // 0 to 1 if (exhaustLvl > 0.1) { // Actuate the hand joints for (const h of ['haL', 'haR']) { const hand = this.J[h]; if (hand && hand.tgt && hand.pos) { const dy = hand.tgt.y - hand.pos.y; // Lifting against gravity (dy > 0) if (dy > 0) { // Muscle torque decay: apply lag when lifting arms hand.tgt.y -= dy * exhaustLvl * 0.45; // Slows ascent } else { // Gravity assist: arms fall slightly heavier/further hand.tgt.y += Math.abs(dy) * exhaustLvl * 0.20; // Accelerates descent } } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick68.chrono_biomechanics', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Project Chrono muscular actuation simulation. Injects fatigue decay curves into the spatial solver, causing limbs to physically lift slower against gravity and drop heavier when exhausted.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 68] PROJECT CHRONO BIOMECHANICAL FATIGUE ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 69 — OPEN DYNAMICS ENGINE (ODE) ABSOLUTE STABILITY DAEMON */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { // NaN EXORCIST FIREWALL if (this.V) { for (const j in this.V) { const v = this.V[j]; if (v && v.pos) { if (!isFinite(v.pos.x) || !isFinite(v.pos.y) || !isFinite(v.pos.z)) { const safeWp = this.worldJoint ? this.worldJoint(j) : {x: this.x, y: 1.0, z: this.z}; if (safeWp && isFinite(safeWp.x) && isFinite(safeWp.y) && isFinite(safeWp.z)) { v.pos.x = safeWp.x; v.pos.y = safeWp.y; v.pos.z = safeWp.z; v.old.x = safeWp.x; v.old.y = safeWp.y; v.old.z = safeWp.z; } else { v.pos.x = this.x || 0; v.pos.y = 1.0; v.pos.z = this.z || 0; v.old.x = this.x || 0; v.old.y = 1.0; v.old.z = this.z || 0; } } } } } _origUR.call(this, dt); if (this.V) { for (const j in this.V) { const v = this.V[j]; if (v && v.pos) { if (!isFinite(v.pos.x) || !isFinite(v.pos.y) || !isFinite(v.pos.z)) { v.pos.x = this.x || 0; v.pos.y = 1.0; v.pos.z = this.z || 0; v.old.x = v.pos.x; v.old.y = v.pos.y; v.old.z = v.pos.z; } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick69.ode_stability_daemon', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Open Dynamics Engine absolute NaN / Infinity firewall. Completely eradicates game-breaking structural explosions / spaghetti limbs.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll matrix sanitize' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 69] OPEN DYNAMICS ENGINE: NaN / INFINITY FIREWALL ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 70 — OVERGROWTH JOINT STRESS DEFORMATION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { _origAR.call(this, dt); if (this.J && this._arV) { if (this.state === 'hurt' || this.state === 'flinch' || this.state === 'stumble') { const stressMultiplier = Math.min(1.0, (this._stumbleMag || 0.5) * 1.5); for (const h of ['haL', 'haR', 'ftL', 'ftR']) { const kinematic = this.J[h]; const physical = this._arV[h]; if (kinematic && physical && physical.pos && isFinite(physical.pos.x)) { kinematic.pos.lerp(physical.pos, stressMultiplier * 0.3 * dt); } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick70.overgrowth_stress_deformation', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Overgrowth joint stress mapping. Physically pulls the visible kinematic skeleton toward the active ragdoll coordinates during stagger states.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 70] OVERGROWTH: JOINT STRESS DEFORMATION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 71 — TORIBASH KINETIC ENERGY SLAM INJECTION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSlamKin = Fighter.prototype._slamVictimKin; if (_origSlamKin) { Fighter.prototype._slamVictimKin = function(by) { _origSlamKin.call(this, by); if (this.V && this.ragdoll) { const dt = 1/60; const e = by.grappleStage; if (e > 0.5) { const chest = this.V['chest']; const head = this.V['head']; const oppMass = by.spec && by.spec.build ? by.spec.build : 1.0; const ballisticForce = 1.2 * oppMass; if (chest) chest.impulse(0, -ballisticForce * dt, 0); if (head) head.impulse(0, -(ballisticForce * 1.5) * dt, 0); } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick71.toribash_kinetic_slams', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Toribash kinetic energy slam injection. Pre-loads physical momentum into the victims ragdoll nodes at the apex of a slam.', call: 'Fighter.prototype._slamVictimKin append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 71] TORIBASH: KINETIC ENERGY SLAM INJECTION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 72 — BARE METTLE CENTER OF MASS WEAPONIZATION V2 */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); if (dmg > 8.0 && region === 'HEAD' && !this.ragdoll && this._arSeed) { if (this._arV && this._arV['head'] && this._arV['chest']) { const dx = (atk.dir && atk.dir.x) ? -atk.dir.x : (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1); const dz = (atk.dir && atk.dir.z) ? -atk.dir.z : -1; const violence = (dmg / 10.0) * 0.15; this._arV['head'].impulse(dx * violence, 0.05, dz * violence); this._arV['chest'].impulse(dx * (violence * 0.5), -0.02, dz * (violence * 0.5)); } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick72.baremettle_com_disruption', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Bare Mettle Exanima motor disruption. Severe head trauma temporarily disables upper-body kinematic matching, allowing unscripted knockback snaps.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit active-ragdoll disruption' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 72] BARE METTLE (EXANIMA): CORE MOTOR SHUTDOWN ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 73 — UNITY CONFIGURABLE JOINTS (ROTATION CLAMP) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolveIK = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolveIK) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { _origSolveIK.call(this); if (this.J && this.state === 'attack' && this.attackPhase > 0.5) { const hL = this.J['haL']; const shL = this.J['shL']; const hR = this.J['haR']; const shR = this.J['shR']; if (hL && shL && hL.pos.distanceTo(shL.pos) > 0.4) { if (this.J['elL'] && this.J['elL'].pos.z > shL.pos.z + 0.1) { this.J['elL'].pos.z -= 0.05; } } if (hR && shR && hR.pos.distanceTo(shR.pos) > 0.4) { if (this.J['elR'] && this.J['elR'].pos.z > shR.pos.z + 0.1) { this.J['elR'].pos.z -= 0.05; } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick73.unity_angular_clamp', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Unity configurable joint angular clamping. Locks arm rotational planes during maximum extension of strikes to prohibit inward-snapped elbow glitches.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK append' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 73] UNITY CONFIGURABLE JOINTS: ANGULAR CLAMP ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 74 — ACTIVE RAGDOLL ABSOLUTE FIREWALL */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { if (this._arV) { for (const j in this._arV) { const v = this._arV[j]; if (v && v.pos) { if (!isFinite(v.pos.x) || !isFinite(v.pos.y) || !isFinite(v.pos.z)) { const safeWp = this.worldJoint ? this.worldJoint(j) : {x: this.x, y: 1.0, z: this.z}; if (safeWp && isFinite(safeWp.x) && isFinite(safeWp.y) && isFinite(safeWp.z)) { v.pos.x = safeWp.x; v.pos.y = safeWp.y; v.pos.z = safeWp.z; v.old.x = safeWp.x; v.old.y = safeWp.y; v.old.z = safeWp.z; } else { v.pos.x = this.x || 0; v.pos.y = 1.0; v.pos.z = this.z || 0; v.old.x = this.x || 0; v.old.y = 1.0; v.old.z = this.z || 0; } } } } } _origAR.call(this, dt); if (this._arV) { for (const j in this._arV) { const v = this._arV[j]; if (v && v.pos) { if (!isFinite(v.pos.x) || !isFinite(v.pos.y) || !isFinite(v.pos.z)) { v.pos.x = this.x || 0; v.pos.y = 1.0; v.pos.z = this.z || 0; v.old.x = v.pos.x; v.old.y = v.pos.y; v.old.z = v.pos.z; } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick74.ar_stability_daemon', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Active Ragdoll NaN Exorcist. Applies the Open Dynamics Engine absolute stability daemon to the persistent active ragdoll layer as well as the fallback layer.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll matrix sanitize' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 74] ACTIVE RAGDOLL FIREWALL ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 75 — WOBBLE NAN FILTER */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origWobble = Fighter.prototype.updateWobble; if (_origWobble) { Fighter.prototype.updateWobble = function(dt) { if (this.wob) { for (const j in this.wob) { const w = this.wob[j]; if (!isFinite(w.x) || !isFinite(w.y) || !isFinite(w.z) || !isFinite(w.vx) || !isFinite(w.vy) || !isFinite(w.vz)) { w.x = 0; w.y = 0; w.z = 0; w.vx = 0; w.vy = 0; w.vz = 0; } } } _origWobble.call(this, dt); }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick75.wobble_nan_filter', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Wobble state NaN filter. Guarantees that procedural hit recoils never transmit corruption into the global mesh state.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateWobble sanitize' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 75] WOBBLE NAN FILTER ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 76 — BARYCENTRIC ROOT SMOOTHING */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolve = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolve) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { // Execute IK _origSolve.call(this); // Root Origin Smoothing Filter (Barycentric style dampening) // Completely dampens violent visual frame-snaps on the root node if animation transitions poorly if (this.J && this.J['pelvis'] && this.J['pelvis'].pos && this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76) { const p = this.J['pelvis'].pos; const o = this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76; const maxRootDist = 0.35; // Maximum distance pelvis can teleport in ONE frame (35cm) const dist = Math.hypot(p.x - o.x, p.y - o.y, p.z - o.z); if (dist > maxRootDist) { const scale = maxRootDist / dist; // Hard-clamp the root location if it violently teleports p.x = o.x + (p.x - o.x) * scale; p.y = o.y + (p.y - o.y) * scale; p.z = o.z + (p.z - o.z) * scale; } } // Store history if (this.J && this.J['pelvis'] && this.J['pelvis'].pos) { if (!this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76) this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76 = { x:0, y:0, z:0 }; this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76.x = this.J['pelvis'].pos.x; this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76.y = this.J['pelvis'].pos.y; this.J['pelvis'].oldPos_brick76.z = this.J['pelvis'].pos.z; } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick76.barycentric_root_smoothing', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Barycentric Root Smoothing. Prevents animations from forcing the core root node to teleport, which systematically destabilized the entire child mesh tracking.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK sanitize' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 76] BARYCENTRIC ROOT SMOOTHING ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 77 — SUMOTORI DREAMS CENTER-OF-MASS BALANCE */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolve = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolve) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { _origSolve.call(this); // Sumotori Dreams Inverted Pendulum // If the fighter is stunned or stumbling, their pelvis IK physically pulls toward // the mid-point of their feet to prevent the physics engine from initiating a collapse too early. if (!this.ragdoll && (this.state === 'stun' || this.state === 'stumble' || this.state === 'flinch')) { const L_ft = this.J['ftL']; const R_ft = this.J['ftR']; const pelvis = this.J['pelvis']; if (L_ft && R_ft && pelvis) { const midX = (L_ft.pos.x + R_ft.pos.x) * 0.5; const midZ = (L_ft.pos.z + R_ft.pos.z) * 0.5; // Gravity pull / sway magnitude based on stamina const swayMult = this.stamina != null ? Math.max(0.1, 1.0 - (this.stamina / 100)) : 0.5; // Smoothly pull pelvis X/Z toward feet center pelvis.pos.lerp({ x: midX, y: pelvis.pos.y, z: midZ }, 0.05 * swayMult); } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick77.sumotori_balance', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Sumotori Dreams Center-Of-Mass Balancing. Dynamically pulls the core pelvis IK toward the mid-point of the feet during staggers to execute true inverted-pendulum balance rather than canned animations.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK sumotori-balance' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 77] SUMOTORI DREAMS BALANCE ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 78 — GANG BEASTS ACTIVE GRIP TENSION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { _origAR.call(this, dt); // Gang Beasts Spring Grip // When grappling, instead of rigid pinning, apply a Hooke's Law spring constraint on the hands // that weakens as stamina drops. High forces break the grip physically. if (this.grappling && this.grabTarget && this.J && this._arV) { const opp = this.grabTarget; if (opp._arV) { const handL = this._arV['haL']; const handR = this._arV['haR']; const oppShL = opp._arV['shL']; const oppShR = opp._arV['shR']; if (handL && handR && oppShL && oppShR) { const stamScale = this.stamina != null ? Math.max(0.2, (this.stamina / 100)) : 1.0; const k = 14.0 * stamScale; // Spring constant // Apply spring resolve [ [handL, oppShR], [handR, oppShL] ].forEach(pair => { const [me, them] = pair; const dx = them.pos.x - me.pos.x; const dy = them.pos.y - me.pos.y; const dz = them.pos.z - me.pos.z; const dist = Math.hypot(dx, dy, dz); if (dist > 0.05 && dist < 0.6) { // Hooke's Law F = -kx const force = dist * k * dt; const fx = (dx / dist) * force; const fy = (dy / dist) * force; const fz = (dz / dist) * force; // Pull grabber to target me.pos.x += fx; me.pos.y += fy; me.pos.z += fz; } }); } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick78.gangbeasts_grip', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Gang Beasts Procedural Grip Tension. Grapples use true physics springs (Hooke\'s Law) connected to the Active Ragdoll, allowing grips to stretch under physical load and decay with stamina.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll grip-tension' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 78] GANG BEASTS ACTIVE GRIP ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 79 — EUPHORIA PREDICTIVE STAGGER CATCH */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSolve = Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK; if (_origSolve) { Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK = function() { _origSolve.call(this); // Euphoria Stagger Step (GTA IV style) // When the body's momentum carries it outside the base of support, the foot dynamically // seeks the floor coordinate "ahead" of the fall vector to catch the body. if (!this.ragdoll && (this.state === 'stumble' || this.state === 'flinch')) { const L_ft = this.J['ftL']; const R_ft = this.J['ftR']; const pelvis = this.J['pelvis']; if (L_ft && R_ft && pelvis) { const velX = (this._arV && this._arV['pelvis']) ? (this._arV['pelvis'].pos.x - this._arV['pelvis'].old.x) : 0; const velZ = (this._arV && this._arV['pelvis']) ? (this._arV['pelvis'].pos.z - this._arV['pelvis'].old.z) : 0; const momentumHypot = Math.hypot(velX, velZ); if (momentumHypot > 0.02) { // Predict where the center of mass will be in 0.25 seconds const projectedX = pelvis.pos.x + (velX * 15.0); const projectedZ = pelvis.pos.z + (velZ * 15.0); // Which foot is further back (safe to lift and plant forward) const lDist = Math.hypot(L_ft.pos.x - projectedX, L_ft.pos.z - projectedZ); const rDist = Math.hypot(R_ft.pos.x - projectedX, R_ft.pos.z - projectedZ); // Lerp the appropriate foot's IK target to the predicted catch point if (lDist > rDist) { L_ft.tgt.x += (projectedX - L_ft.tgt.x) * 0.15; L_ft.tgt.z += (projectedZ - L_ft.tgt.z) * 0.15; } else { R_ft.tgt.x += (projectedX - R_ft.tgt.x) * 0.15; R_ft.tgt.z += (projectedZ - R_ft.tgt.z) * 0.15; } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick79.euphoria_stagger', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Euphoria Stagger Predictive Foot-Planting. Reads raw center-of-mass momentum and mathematically drives the trailing foot IK forward to catch the projected fall vector.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.solveLimbIK euphoria-catch' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 79] EUPHORIA PREDICTIVE STAGGER CATCH ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 80 — DEAD OR ALIVE 6 IMPACT RIPPLE DAEMON */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); // DOA-style local ripple impact // We take the immediate impact vector and propagate it through the 'wobble' IK offset system // traversing from the hit-node through its parent connections simulating a physical shockwave. if (this.wob && dmg > 0) { const mag = Math.min(1.0, dmg / 20.0); const dirX = atk.dir && atk.dir.x ? atk.dir.x : 0; const dirZ = atk.dir && atk.dir.z ? atk.dir.z : 0; // Define local propagation tree let chain = []; if (region === 'head') chain = ['head', 'neck', 'chest', 'spineMid']; if (region === 'chest') chain = ['chest', 'spineMid', 'pelvis']; if (region.includes('arm')) chain = [region.includes('L') ?
