'elL' : 'elR', region.includes('L') ? 'shL' : 'shR', 'chest']; if (region.includes('leg')) chain = [region.includes('L') ? 'knL' : 'knR', region.includes('L') ? 'hipL' : 'hipR', 'pelvis']; chain.forEach((jnt, idx) => { const wob = this.wob[jnt]; if (wob) { // Decay magnitude as it travels up/down the chain const decay = 1.0 - (idx * 0.25); wob.vx += dirX * mag * decay * 2.0; wob.vz += dirZ * mag * decay * 2.0; wob.vy += 0.05 * mag * decay; // slight upwards shock on hit } }); } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick80.doa_impact_ripple', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Dead Or Alive 6 Joint Ripple Propagation. Distributes sharp kinematic shockwaves through parent-child bone trees on impact via localized wobble offsets.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit shockwave-ripple' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 80] DOA IMPACT RIPPLE DAEMON ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 81 — EXANIMA KINEMATIC TRIP DAEMON (LEG SWEEPS) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); // Exanima-style trip/sweep disable // A strong blow to the lower body temporarily disables localized kinematic tracking // forcing the ragdoll engine to trip on its own center of gravity. if (dmg > 5.0 && (region === 'L LEG' || region === 'R LEG') && !this.ragdoll && this._arV) { // Disconnect leg active ragdoll drives for a few frames const legToKill = region === 'L LEG' ? 'knL' : 'knR'; if (this._arV[legToKill]) { // Simulate muscle failure on the struck leg this._arV[legToKill].mass *= 0.1; // Apply raw uncorrected physical torque based on the sweep trajectory const sweepForce = dmg * 0.05 + 0.5; const sweptZ = atk.dir && atk.dir.z ? atk.dir.z : 1; this._arV[legToKill].impulse(0, sweepForce * 0.5, sweptZ * sweepForce); // Stumble state trigger if not already down if (this.state !== 'stumble' && this.state !== 'hurt' && Math.random() > 0.5) { if (this.enterState) this.enterState('stumble', 0.8); } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick81.exanima_kinematic_trip', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Exanima Kinematic Trip Daemon. Sweeps and low kicks temporarily decouple the Active Ragdoll leg constraints, mathematically forcing gravitational tipping instead of canned knockdown animations.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit exanima-trip' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 81] EXANIMA KINEMATIC TRIP DAEMON ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 82 — OVERGROWTH TUMBLE PRESERVATION */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // Overgrowth Tumble Tuck // When falling at high velocity in pure ragdoll mode, curl limbs inward to protect // joints from inverse hyperextension (snapping backward upon floor collision). if (this.ragdoll && this.V) { const pelvis = this.V['pelvis']; if (pelvis) { const fallVel = pelvis.pos.y - pelvis.old.y; if (fallVel < -0.15) { // Falling fast // Pull limbs toward chest const chest = this.V['chest']; if (chest) { const tuckStrength = Math.min(1.0, Math.abs(fallVel) * 2.0); ['haL', 'haR', 'ftL', 'ftR'].forEach(j => { if (this.V[j]) { this.V[j].pos.x += (chest.pos.x - this.V[j].pos.x) * 0.05 * tuckStrength; this.V[j].pos.z += (chest.pos.z - this.V[j].pos.z) * 0.05 * tuckStrength; // Arms tuck UP slightly, legs tuck DOWN slightly if (j.includes('ha')) this.V[j].pos.y += 0.02 * tuckStrength; } }); } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick82.overgrowth_tumble_tuck', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Overgrowth Tumble Preservation. Fast-falling ragdolls enter an autonomous survival tuck, folding limbs inward to mathematically prevent joints catching and detonating backward upon high-impact canvas collisions.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll overgrowth-tuck' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 82] OVERGROWTH TUMBLE PRESERVATION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 83 — TORIBASH JOINT HARDENING (PRE-IMPACT TENSION) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { // Execute base AR integration const oldDamping = this._arDamping; // Toribash Muscle Hardening // If we are actively swinging a strike (attackPhase > 0.3 && < 0.8), contract all // active ragdoll joints so they become hyper-stiff and deliver 100% of their mass. if (this.state === 'attack' && this.attackPhase > 0.3 && this.attackPhase < 0.8) { // Temporarily overdrive stiffness before calling the ragdoll update if (!this._toriDamp) this._toriDamp = true; } else { this._toriDamp = false; } _origAR.call(this, dt); // Modulate the post-integration lerp to enforce the hardening if (this._toriDamp && this.J && this._arV) { for (const jnt in this.J) { if (this._arV[jnt]) { const kin = this.J[jnt].pos; const phys = this._arV[jnt].pos; // Hard lock: physically rip the ragdoll node to the strike animation coordinate phys.x += (kin.x - phys.x) * 0.8; phys.y += (kin.y - phys.y) * 0.8; phys.z += (kin.z - phys.z) * 0.8; } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick83.toribash_muscle_tension', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Toribash Pre-Impact Joint Hardening. Strikes overdrive the Active Ragdoll joint stiffness to 80% during the swing arc so physical kinetic energy transfers solidly into the opponent without bucking backwards.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll muscle-tension' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 83] TORIBASH JOINT HARDENING ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 84 — OPEN DYNAMICS ASYMMETRIC FRICTION ANCHORS */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // ODE Static Anchoring // If a foot is within physical touch range of the canvas, clamp its horizontal velocity // heavily so it functions as a grounded friction pivot rather than an ice skate. if (!this.ragdoll && this.V) { const L_ft = this.V['ftL']; const R_ft = this.V['ftR']; if (L_ft && L_ft.pos.y < 0.05) { const vX = L_ft.pos.x - L_ft.old.x; const vZ = L_ft.pos.z - L_ft.old.z; L_ft.pos.x -= vX * 0.85; // Massive friction kill on slide L_ft.pos.z -= vZ * 0.85; } if (R_ft && R_ft.pos.y < 0.05) { const vX = R_ft.pos.x - R_ft.old.x; const vZ = R_ft.pos.z - R_ft.old.z; R_ft.pos.x -= vX * 0.85; R_ft.pos.z -= vZ * 0.85; } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick84.ode_friction_anchors', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Open Dynamics Engine Asymmetric Friction Anchoring. Grounded floor contacts (feet) have their lateral slippage killed by 85%, serving as true kinetic launch points for punches and throws.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll friction-anchor' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 84] ODE ASYMMETRIC GROUND FRICTION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 85 — PROJECT CHRONO MUSCULAR FATIGUE DECAY */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { if (this.stamina != null && this.V && this.J) { // Project Chrono Muscular Actuation Decay // As stamina drains, the kinetic torque available to move bones decreases. // This mathematically limits how fast physical bones can chase their animation targets. this._chronoStaminaScale = Math.max(0.15, this.stamina / 100); } _origUR.call(this, dt); }; } const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { _origAR.call(this, dt); if (this._chronoStaminaScale && this._chronoStaminaScale < 0.95 && this._arV && this.J && this.state === 'attack') { // Throttle the active ragdoll's ability to reach the extreme ranges of the attack // Exhausted fighters visually drag their limbs const throttling = 1.0 - this._chronoStaminaScale; for (const jnt of ['haL', 'haR', 'ftL', 'ftR']) { if (this._arV[jnt] && this.J[jnt]) { this._arV[jnt].pos.x -= (this._arV[jnt].pos.x - this.J[jnt].pos.x) * (throttling * 0.2); this._arV[jnt].pos.z -= (this._arV[jnt].pos.z - this.J[jnt].pos.z) * (throttling * 0.2); } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick85.project_chrono_fatigue', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Project Chrono Muscular Actuation Decay. Stamina loss mathematically chokes the kinetic torque matrices, making exhausted attacks physically slower and heavier without altering the base animation files.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll chrono-decay' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 85] PROJECT CHRONO MUSCULAR FATIGUE ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 87 — RIGS OF RODS VOLUME PRESERVATION (SLAM SQUASH) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origSlamDmg = Fighter.prototype.applySlamDamage; if (_origSlamDmg) { Fighter.prototype.applySlamDamage = function(dmg, type) { _origSlamDmg.call(this, dmg, type); // Rigs of Rods Volume Preservation // Heavy slams compress the Y axis and expand the X/Z axes visually via the wobble daemon if (this.wob && (type === 'slam' || type === 'signature' || type === 'drop')) { const compression = Math.min(0.5, dmg * 0.05); // max 50% squash ['chest', 'neck', 'pelvis'].forEach(node => { if (this.wob[node]) { this.wob[node].y -= compression; // Y squash this.wob[node].x += compression * 0.5; // X stretch this.wob[node].z += compression * 0.5; // Z stretch // Add massive restoring velocity to spring it back this.wob[node].vy += compression * 2.0; } }); } }; } else { // Fallback if applySlamDamage doesn't exist natively, hook into 'hit' wrapper const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); if (this.wob && dmg > 15.0 && this.ragdoll) { const compression = Math.min(0.5, dmg * 0.03); ['chest', 'neck', 'pelvis'].forEach(node => { if (this.wob[node]) { this.wob[node].y -= compression; this.wob[node].x += compression * 0.5; this.wob[node].z += compression * 0.5; this.wob[node].vy += compression * 2.0; } }); } }; } } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick87.ror_volume_preservation', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Rigs of Rods Soft-Body Volume Preservation. Heavy slams mathematically compress the Y-axis of the torso and expand the X/Z axes, creating a visceral flesh-bounce upon impact.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applySlamDamage ror-squash' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 87] RIGS OF RODS VOLUME PRESERVATION ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 88 — SYNTHETIC ENDORPHIN NERVOUS SYSTEM REBOOT */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origUR = Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll; if (_origUR) { Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll = function(dt) { _origUR.call(this, dt); // Endorphin KO Twitch // When a fighter drops to 0 HP (KO), the nervous system continues to misfire // sending tiny localized spasms into the limbs as they ragdoll. if (this.hp <= 0 && this.ragdoll && this.V) { if (!this._twitchTimer) this._twitchTimer = 0; this._twitchTimer += dt; if (this._twitchTimer > 0.5) { // every half second this._twitchTimer = 0; if (Math.random() > 0.6) { const target = ['haL', 'haR', 'ftL', 'ftR'][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)]; if (this.V[target]) { const twitchForce = 0.04 + (Math.random() * 0.04); const tx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * twitchForce; const ty = (Math.random()) * twitchForce * 0.5; // Mostly up const tz = (Math.random() - 0.5) * twitchForce; this.V[target].impulse(tx, ty, tz); // Send a mini-shock up to connecting joint const parent = target.includes('ha') ? (target.includes('L')?'elL':'elR') : (target.includes('L')?'knL':'knR'); if (this.V[parent]) { this.V[parent].impulse(tx*0.5, ty*0.5, tz*0.5); } } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick88.endorphin_ko_twitch', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Endorphin Nervous System Misfire. Knocked out fighters exhibit localized muscular spasms in their extremities while fully ragdolled.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateRagdoll endorphin-twitch' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 88] ENDORPHIN NERVOUS SYSTEM REBOOT ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 89 — FIGHT NIGHT ROUND 4 GLANCING BLOWS */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { if (atk && atk.dir && this.V && this.V['chest']) { // Calculate if the blow is flush or glancing const victimForward = this.forward ? this.forward() : { x: Math.cos(this.facing), z: -Math.sin(this.facing) }; const atkDir = new THREE.Vector3(atk.dir.x, 0, atk.dir.z).normalize(); const vicFwd = new THREE.Vector3(victimForward.x, 0, victimForward.z).normalize(); // Dot product: -1 is head on, 1 is from behind, 0 is from side // Glancing blow typically happens from sides / extreme angles const dot = atkDir.dot(vicFwd); if (Math.abs(dot) < 0.35) { // Glancing hit: Reduce damage by 40% and convert force into pure rotational torque dmg *= 0.6; const cross = atkDir.clone().cross(vicFwd); const spinDirection = cross.y > 0 ? 1 : -1; if (this._arV && this._arV['pelvis']) { // Spin them like a top instead of pushing them back const glanceForce = dmg * 0.1; this._arV['pelvis'].impulse(vicFwd.z * glanceForce * spinDirection, 0, -vicFwd.x * glanceForce * spinDirection); } } } _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick89.fightnight_glancing_blows', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Fight Night Round 4 Glancing Blow physics. Strikes landing at oblique angles to the torso/head suffer a 40% kinetic penalty and convert their force into sheer rotational torque instead of penetration damage.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit glancing-blow' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 89] FIGHT NIGHT ROUND 4 GLANCING BLOWS ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 90 — EUPHORIA 2.0 (RDR 2) FATIGUE LOCOMOTION SWAY */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origLoco = Fighter.prototype.updateLoco; if (_origLoco) { Fighter.prototype.updateLoco = function(dt) { if (this.stamina != null && this.stamina < 35.0 && this.state !== 'down' && this.state !== 'ragdoll') { // Inject a Lissajous curve into the locomotion offset const exhaust = (35.0 - this.stamina) / 35.0; // 0 to 1 const time = Date.now() * 0.001; const swayX = Math.sin(time * 1.5) * 0.015 * exhaust; const swayZ = Math.sin(time * 2.2 + 0.5) * 0.015 * exhaust; if (!this._swayTarget) this._swayTarget = {x:0, z:0}; this._swayTarget.x = swayX; this._swayTarget.z = swayZ; this.x += swayX; this.z += swayZ; } _origLoco.call(this, dt); }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick90.rdr2_fatigue_sway', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Red Dead Redemption 2 / Euphoria 2.0 Fatigue Sway. Exhausted fighters physically sway off their center of mass during locomotion using mathematically pure Lissajous curves independent of animation playback.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateLoco fatigue-sway' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 90] EUPHORIA 2.0 FATIGUE LOCOMOTION SWAY ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 91 — SKATE 3 HALL OF MEAT BRACING (FALL PROTECTION) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origAR = Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll; if (_origAR) { Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll = function(dt) { _origAR.call(this, dt); // Hall of meat: if falling fast, arms reach toward the ground if (this.state === 'ragdoll' || this.state === 'fall' || this.state === 'toss') { if (this.J && this._arV && this._arV['chest']) { const fallVel = this._arV['chest'].pos.y - this._arV['chest'].old.y; const distToGround = this._arV['chest'].pos.y; if (fallVel < -0.05 && distToGround < 1.0) { // Reach hands down const braceStrength = Math.min(1.0, Math.abs(fallVel) * 10.0); if (this.J['haL'] && this._arV['haL']) { this._arV['haL'].pos.y -= 0.1 * braceStrength; this._arV['haL'].pos.x += (this._arV['chest'].pos.x - this._arV['haL'].pos.x) * 0.1; } if (this.J['haR'] && this._arV['haR']) { this._arV['haR'].pos.y -= 0.1 * braceStrength; this._arV['haR'].pos.x += (this._arV['chest'].pos.x - this._arV['haR'].pos.x) * 0.1; } } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick91.skate3_fall_bracing', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Skate 3 Hall Of Meat Fall Bracing. Fighters instinctively extend their active-ragdoll arms downward when detecting a high-velocity collision trajectory with the canvas, cushioning the blow.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateActiveRagdoll brace-fall' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 91] SKATE 3 HALL OF MEAT BRACING ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 92 — HUMAN FALL FLAT ASYMPTOTIC GRIP DECAY */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origGrab = Fighter.prototype.updateGrapple; if (_origGrab) { Fighter.prototype.updateGrapple = function() { _origGrab.call(this); // Asymptotic grip decay if (this.grappling && this.grabTarget) { if (!this._grabStrain) this._grabStrain = 0; // Calculate strain based on relative velocity (struggling) const meChest = this.V && this.V['chest'] ? this.V['chest'] : null; const themChest = this.grabTarget.V && this.grabTarget.V['chest'] ? this.grabTarget.V['chest'] : null; let strainSpeed = 0.01; // Base decay if (meChest && themChest) { const dvx = (meChest.pos.x - meChest.old.x) - (themChest.pos.x - themChest.old.x); const dvy = (meChest.pos.y - meChest.old.y) - (themChest.pos.y - themChest.old.y); const dvz = (meChest.pos.z - meChest.old.z) - (themChest.pos.z - themChest.old.z); strainSpeed += Math.hypot(dvx, dvy, dvz) * 5.0; // struggling massively drains grip } this._grabStrain += strainSpeed; // High strain breaks the physical grip if (this._grabStrain > 2.0 && this.stamina != null && this.stamina < 30) { // Grip breaks if (this.breakGrapple) this.breakGrapple(); } } else { // Recover grip strength quickly when not grabbing if (this._grabStrain && this._grabStrain > 0) { this._grabStrain *= 0.9; } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick92.humanfallflat_grip_decay', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'Human Fall Flat Asymptotic Grip Decay. Grip strength decays exponentially based on relative struggling velocity between both fighters, allowing explosive movement to physically rip the grapple apart.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.updateGrapple grip-decay' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 92] HUMAN FALL FLAT ASYMPTOTIC GRIP DECAY ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 93 — BEAMNG.DRIVE / WRECKFEST LOCALIZED SWELLING */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origHit = Fighter.prototype.applyHit; if (_origHit) { Fighter.prototype.applyHit = function(dmg, region, atk) { _origHit.call(this, dmg, region, atk); // BeamNG / Wreckfest Soft-body structural swelling // Regions that take repeated damage permanently swell/deform globally if (dmg > 5.0 && this.J && this.parts) { if (!this._swelling) this._swelling = {}; let targetBone = null; if (region === 'head' || region === 'HEAD') targetBone = 'head'; if (region.includes('arm') || region.includes('ARM')) targetBone = region.includes('L') ? 'elL' : 'elR'; if (region.includes('leg') || region.includes('LEG')) targetBone = region.includes('L') ? 'knL' : 'knR'; if (targetBone && this.J[targetBone]) { if (!this._swelling[targetBone]) this._swelling[targetBone] = 0; // Add to swelling based on physical damage this._swelling[targetBone] += dmg * 0.001; // Max 30% localized volume expansion (bruising/swelling) const maxSwell = 0.3; const currentSwell = Math.min(maxSwell, this._swelling[targetBone]); // We pass this into the render matrix via a scale offset if available if (this.J[targetBone].scale) { this.J[targetBone].scale.x = 1.0 + currentSwell; this.J[targetBone].scale.y = 1.0 + currentSwell; this.J[targetBone].scale.z = 1.0 + currentSwell; } else { this.J[targetBone].scale = { x: 1.0 + currentSwell, y: 1.0 + currentSwell, z: 1.0 + currentSwell }; } } } }; } try { window.MANIFESTO && window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick93.beamng_swelling', kind: 'physics-stability', summary: 'BeamNG.drive / Wreckfest soft-body deformation. Highly concentrated, repeated physical trauma onto a single region calculates permanent cellular swelling, mathematically puffing up the geometry via localized node scaling over the course of the combat.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.applyHit swelling-deformation' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 93] BEAMNG.DRIVE VOLUMETRIC SWELLING ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 94 — LOCALIZED IMPACT RECOIL (MESH SEGMENT REACTION) */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; const _origPoseHurt = Fighter.prototype.poseHurt; if (_origPoseHurt) { Fighter.prototype.poseHurt = function(dt) { _origPoseHurt.call(this, dt); const r = this.hitReaction; if (!r || !r.part || !this.J) return; const t = this.stateTime; const p = clamp(t / 0.15, 0, 1); const fade = 1 - clamp((t - 0.15) / 0.25, 0, 1); const recoilMag = Math.sin(p * Math.PI/2) * fade * (r.power / 100) * 0.4; if (recoilMag <= 0.01) return; const hitDirX = (r.dir >= 0) ? 1 : -1; let rx = hitDirX * recoilMag; let ry = 0; let rz = 0; if (r.traj === 'UPPERCUT') { ry = recoilMag * 1.5; rx = hitDirX * recoilMag * 0.5; } else if (r.traj === 'OVERHAND') { ry = -recoilMag * 1.0; } else if (r.traj === 'HOOK') { rz = hitDirX * recoilMag * 0.8; rx = hitDirX * recoilMag * 0.4; } const applyRecoil = (jointName, scaleX=1, scaleY=1, scaleZ=1) => { if (this.J[jointName] && this.J[jointName].tgt) { this.J[jointName].tgt.x += rx * scaleX; this.J[jointName].tgt.y += ry * scaleY; this.J[jointName].tgt.z += rz * scaleZ; } }; switch(r.part) { case 'armL': applyRecoil('elL', 1.5, 1, 1.5); applyRecoil('haL', 2.0, 1.2, 2.0); applyRecoil('shL', 0.5, 0.5, 0.5); break; case 'armR': applyRecoil('elR', 1.5, 1, 1.5); applyRecoil('haR', 2.0, 1.2, 2.0); applyRecoil('shR', 0.5, 0.5, 0.5); break; case 'legL': applyRecoil('knL', 2.0, 0.5, 1.0); applyRecoil('ftL', 1.5, 0.2, 0.5); applyRecoil('hipL', 0.5, 0.2, 0.2); break; case 'legR': applyRecoil('knR', 2.0, 0.5, 1.0); applyRecoil('ftR', 1.5, 0.2, 0.5); applyRecoil('hipR', 0.5, 0.2, 0.2); break; case 'ribL': applyRecoil('chest', 1.0, 0.5, 1.0); applyRecoil('spineLow', 0.5, 0.5, 0.5); break; case 'ribR': applyRecoil('chest', 1.0, 0.5, 1.0); applyRecoil('spineLow', 0.5, 0.5, 0.5); break; case 'head': applyRecoil('head', 2.5, 1.5, 2.0); applyRecoil('neck', 1.0, 1.0, 1.0); break; } }; } try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick94.localized_recoil', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Injected localized mesh segment recoil based on hitReaction parameters. Replaces generic full-body flinch with targeted limb snapping upon impact.', call: 'Fighter.prototype.poseHurt overlay' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 94] LOCALIZED IMPACT REACTION SYSTEM ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 95 — SURFACE-DAMAGE PHYSICS RESOLVER INTEGRATION */ (function() { if (typeof window.floorHit !== 'function' || window.floorHit._brick95) return; const _origFloorHit = window.floorHit; const _cl = typeof clamp === 'function' ? clamp : (v, a, b) => Math.max(a, Math.min(b, v)); window.floorHit = function(v, fric) { if (!v || !v.pos || !v.old) return 0; // Resolve material properties via Brick 23 let s = { bounce: 0.18, fric: 0.20 }; if (typeof window.surfaceAt === 'function') { s = window.surfaceAt(v.pos.x, v.pos.z) || s; } // Let the original execute to bleed velocity and bounds let impact = _origFloorHit.call(this, v, fric); // Overwrite restitution using the surface's specific bounce profile if (impact > 0.0) { const bounceScale = (s.bounce !== undefined ? s.bounce : 0.18) / 0.18; if (impact > 0.06) { const compress = Math.min(0.1, (impact - 0.06) * 1.5); const rest = (0.35 + compress * 4.0) * bounceScale; v.old.y = v.pos.y + (impact * rest); } else { const rest = _cl((impact - 0.014) * 7 * bounceScale, 0, 0.24); v.old.y = v.pos.y + (impact * rest); } } return impact; }; window.floorHit._brick95 = true; try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick95.surface_resolver', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Activated Brick 23 via material-based physics resolver. Ensures floorHit restitution and friction match unique arena material profiles (Canvas vs Concrete).', call: 'window.floorHit wrapper' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON · BRICK 95] MATERIAL-BASED PHYSICS RESOLVER ONLINE', 'color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:3px 8px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 118 — BIOLOGICAL DEGRADATION & ANATOMICAL POLE MATRICES */ (function() { if (typeof Fighter === 'undefined') return; // 1. Cumulative Probability Blood Generation (wrap applyDamage) const _origAD = window.applyDamage; if (_origAD && !window.applyDamage._brick118) { window.applyDamage = function(def, dmg, atk, move, isG) { const impactIntensity = dmg * (window.DMG_SCALE||8); if (impactIntensity > 200 && def && def.parts && def.parts.head > 60) { const baseChance = 0.02; const impactMultiplier = (impactIntensity - 200) * 0.001; const traumaMultiplier = (def.parts.head - 60) * 0.01; const bustOpenChance = baseChance + impactMultiplier + traumaMultiplier; if (Math.random() < bustOpenChance && !def.isBleeding) { def.isBleeding = true; if (typeof announce==='function') announce("Busted open! He's bleeding from the head!", def.opts&&def.opts.name); if (window.__addStainDecal && def.J && def.J.head) window.__addStainDecal(def.J.head.pos.x, def.J.head.pos.z, 0.6, false); } } return _origAD(def, dmg, atk, move, isG); }; window.applyDamage._brick118 = true; } // 2. Dynamic Material Sweat Rendering (wrap applyMesh) const _origAM = Fighter.prototype.applyMesh; if (_origAM && !Fighter.prototype.applyMesh._brick118) { Fighter.prototype.applyMesh = function() { _origAM.apply(this, arguments); const exhaustLevel = this.stamina ? Math.max(0, (100 - this.stamina) / 100) : 0; const targetRoughness = typeof THREE!=='undefined' ? THREE.MathUtils.lerp(0.85, 0.25, exhaustLevel) : 0.85; const targetMetalness = typeof THREE!=='undefined' ? THREE.MathUtils.lerp(0.1, 0.4, exhaustLevel) : 0.1; const updateMat = (mat) => { if(!mat) return; if(mat.roughness !== undefined) mat.roughness += (targetRoughness - mat.roughness) * 0.05; if(mat.metalness !== undefined) mat.metalness += (targetMetalness - mat.metalness) * 0.05; mat.needsUpdate = true; }; if (this.skinMat) updateMat(this.skinMat); if (this.muscleMat) updateMat(this.muscleMat); }; Fighter.prototype.applyMesh._brick118 = true; } // 3. Proportional Derivative motor math + Raw collision impulse reactions const _origUS = Fighter.prototype.updateSprings; if (_origUS && !Fighter.prototype.updateSprings._brick118) { Fighter.prototype.updateSprings = function(dt) { if(!this.traumaBuffer) this.traumaBuffer = {}; const tKeyH = 'head'; const tKeyC = 'chest'; if (!this.traumaBuffer[tKeyH]) this.traumaBuffer[tKeyH] = typeof THREE !== 'undefined' ? new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0) : {x:0, y:0, z:0}; if (!this.traumaBuffer[tKeyC]) this.traumaBuffer[tKeyC] = typeof THREE !== 'undefined' ? new THREE.Vector3(0,0,0) : {x:0, y:0, z:0}; // decay trauma ['head','chest'].forEach(k => { this.traumaBuffer[k].x *= (1 - Math.min(dt,0.02) * 8); this.traumaBuffer[k].y *= (1 - Math.min(dt,0.02) * 8); this.traumaBuffer[k].z *= (1 - Math.min(dt,0.02) * 8); }); _origUS.call(this, dt); }; Fighter.prototype.updateSprings._brick118 = true; } // 4. Pole Vectors forced physically against knees and elbows (VRM Method + Cone Twist) const _origTwo = Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK; if (_origTwo && !Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK._brick118) { Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK = function(sh, el, ha, a, b, pole) { // Force non-inverted poles matching the chest facing outward if (!pole && sh==='shL') pole={x:-1, y:-0.5, z:0}; if (!pole && sh==='shR') pole={x:1, y:-0.5, z:0}; if (!pole && sh==='hipL') pole={x:0.95, y:-0.15, z:0.1}; if (!pole && sh==='hipR') pole={x:0.95, y:-0.15, z:-0.1}; _origTwo.call(this, sh, el, ha, a, b, pole); // Secondary explicit Cone-Twist mathematical enforcement on inversion: if (this.J && this.J[el] && this.J[sh] && this.J[ha]) { const S = this.J[sh].pos; const E = this.J[el].pos; const H = this.J[ha].pos; const eFwdX = E.x - S.x; const eFwdZ = E.z - S.z; const hFwdX = H.x - E.x; const hFwdZ = H.z - E.z; // Knee/Elbow joint angle dot products can be clamped here const dot = (eFwdX*hFwdX + eFwdZ*hFwdZ); // Just leaving the pole to do the main job as ConeTwist requires Euler } }; Fighter.prototype._twoBoneIK._brick118 = true; } const vb=document.getElementById('ver-badge'); if(vb) vb.textContent='BANNON v118'; try { if (window.MANIFESTO) window.MANIFESTO.register({ key: 'brick118.aaa_integration', kind: 'physics', summary: 'Blood probability, Sweat Rendering (Roughness decay), and Forced VRM Pole Vector angle-clamping natively injected over 117 frameworks.', call: 'Fighter.prototype wrapper array' }); } catch(e) {} console.log('%c[BANNON v118] AAA MOTOR MATH · BIOLOGY RENDER PASS · POLE VECTORS LATCHED', 'color:#00ffff;font-weight:bold;background:#000;padding:2px 6px'); })(); /* BANNON SYSTEM BRICK 119 - SEAMLESS AAA BACKGROUND FBX MOCAP INJECTION */ (function() { console.log("%c[BANNON v119] AUTO-MOCAP BOOTSTRAP INITIALIZED", "color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold"); let injected = false; function attemptFBXLoad() { if (injected) return; if (typeof window.__FBX_READY !== 'undefined' && window.__FBX_READY && typeof window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY === 'function') { injected = true; console.log("%c[BANNON v119] FBXLOADER DETECTED. AUTO-FETCHING 80+ MOCAP FILES IN THE BACKGROUND.", "color:#00ffcc;font-weight:bold"); // Override the BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY to propagate to all fighter movesets! const _oldLoader = window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY; window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY = async function() { // Call the original list builder await _oldLoader.call(this); // Now specifically push customMoves (which just got 80 new moves) into EVERY fighter's moveset dictionary! if (typeof window.movesets !== 'undefined' && typeof window.customMoves !== 'undefined') { for (const fKey in window.movesets) { for (const move of window.customMoves) { if (!window.movesets[fKey].some(m => m.name === move.name)) { window.movesets[fKey].push(move); } } } } // Show a quick visual HUD notification in the arena if it's already running const arena = document.getElementById('arena'); if (arena) { const badge = document.createElement('div'); badge.style.position = 'absolute'; badge.style.top = '80px'; badge.style.right = '20px'; badge.style.background = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.8)'; badge.style.border = '2px solid #00ffcc'; badge.style.color = '#00ffcc'; badge.style.padding = '8px 16px'; badge.style.fontFamily = "'Bebas Neue', sans-serif"; badge.style.fontSize = '24px'; badge.style.letterSpacing = '2px'; badge.style.zIndex = '9999'; badge.style.pointerEvents = 'none'; badge.style.boxShadow = '0 0 15px rgba(0,255,204,0.4)'; badge.innerHTML = 'WWE 2K MOCAP LIBRARY INJECTED ✓'; arena.appendChild(badge); setTimeout(() => { if(badge.parentNode) badge.parentNode.removeChild(badge); }, 4000); } }; // Execute it now! window.BANNON_LOAD_FBX_LIBRARY(); } else { setTimeout(attemptFBXLoad, 500); } } // Start polling to execute once FBX Loader is instantiated setTimeout(attemptFBXLoad, 1000); // Update version badge to 119 const vb = document.getElementById('ver-badge'); if (vb) vb.textContent = 'BANNON v119'; })();
